Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * CLI: memorytree daemon install|uninstall|run-once|watch|status
    3:  * Port of scripts/memorytree_daemon.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, unlinkSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { homedir } from 'node:os'
    8: import { basename, dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
    9: import { platform } from 'node:process'
   10: import { fileURLToPath } from 'node:url'
   11: 
   12: import {
   13:   DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH,
   14:   configPath,
   15:   findProjectForPath,
   16:   intervalToSeconds,
   17:   loadConfig,
   18:   saveConfig,
   19:   upsertProject,
   20: } from '../heartbeat/config.js'
   21: import { readLockPid } from '../heartbeat/lock.js'
   22: import {
   23:   defaultProjectWorktreePath,
   24:   defaultProjectWorktreeBranch,
   25:   ensureBranchUpstream,
   26:   ensureProjectWorktree,
   27:   isValidWorktreeBranchName,
   28: } from '../heartbeat/worktree.js'
   29: import { execCommand } from '../utils/exec.js'
   30: 
   31: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   32: // Constants
   33: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   34: 
   35: const TASK_NAME = 'MemoryTree Heartbeat'
   36: const LAUNCHD_LABEL = 'com.memorytree.heartbeat'
   37: const QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL = '5m'
   38: const QUICK_START_REFRESH_INTERVAL = '30m'
   39: 
   40: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   41: // Subcommands
   42: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   43: 
   44: export function cmdInstall(options: { interval?: string; autoPush?: string }): number {
   45:   let config = loadConfig()
   46: 
   47:   if (options.interval) {
   48:     config = { ...config, heartbeat_interval: options.interval }
   49:   }
   50:   if (options.autoPush) {
   51:     config = { ...config, auto_push: options.autoPush === 'true' }
   52:   }
   53: 
   54:   saveConfig(config)
   55:   const seconds = intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)
   56:   const scriptPath = heartbeatScriptPath()
   57: 
   58:   const sys = platform
   59:   if (sys === 'linux') return installCron(scriptPath, seconds)
   60:   if (sys === 'darwin') return installLaunchd(scriptPath, seconds)
   61:   if (sys === 'win32') return installSchtasks(scriptPath, seconds)
   62: 
   63:   process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
   64:   return 1
   65: }
   66: 
   67: export function cmdUninstall(): number {
   68:   const sys = platform
   69:   if (sys === 'linux') return uninstallCron()
   70:   if (sys === 'darwin') return uninstallLaunchd()
   71:   if (sys === 'win32') return uninstallSchtasks()
   72: 
   73:   process.stderr.write(`Unsupported platform: ${sys}\n`)
   74:   return 1
   75: }
   76: 
   77: export async function cmdRunOnce(options: { root?: string; force?: boolean } = {}): Promise<number> {
   78:   const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
   79:   return main(options)
   80: }
   81: 
   82: export async function cmdWatch(options: { interval?: string }): Promise<number> {
   83:   const config = loadConfig()
   84:   const intervalStr = options.interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
   85:   const seconds = intervalToSeconds(intervalStr)
   86:   const { main } = await import('../heartbeat/heartbeat.js')
   87: 
   88:   process.stdout.write(`Watch mode: running heartbeat every ${seconds}s. Press Ctrl+C to stop.\n`)
   89:   try {
   90:     // eslint-disable-next-line no-constant-condition
   91:     while (true) {
   92:       await main()
   93:       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, seconds * 1000))
   94:     }
   95:   } catch {
   96:     process.stdout.write('\nWatch mode stopped.\n')
   97:   }
   98:   return 0
   99: }
  100: 
  101: export function cmdStatus(): number {
  102:   const registered = isHeartbeatRegistered()
  103: 
  104:   const sys = platform
  105:   const platformName = sys === 'darwin' ? 'Darwin' : sys === 'win32' ? 'Windows' : 'Linux'
  106:   process.stdout.write(`Platform:   ${platformName}\n`)
  107:   process.stdout.write(`Registered: ${registered ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
  108: 
  109:   const pid = readLockPid()
  110:   if (pid !== null) {
  111:     process.stdout.write(`Lock:       held by PID ${pid}\n`)
  112:   } else {
  113:     process.stdout.write('Lock:       not held\n')
  114:   }
  115: 
  116:   if (existsSync(configPath())) {
  117:     const config = loadConfig()
  118:     process.stdout.write(`Interval:   ${config.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
  119:     process.stdout.write(`Auto-push:  ${config.auto_push}\n`)
  120:     process.stdout.write(`Projects:   ${config.projects.length}\n`)
  121:   } else {
  122:     process.stdout.write('Config:     not found (using defaults)\n')
  123:   }
  124: 
  125:   return 0
  126: }
  127: 
  128: export function isHeartbeatRegistered(): boolean {
  129:   const sys = platform
  130:   if (sys === 'linux') return isCronRegistered()
  131:   if (sys === 'darwin') return isLaunchdRegistered()
  132:   if (sys === 'win32') return isSchtasksRegistered()
  133:   return false
  134: }
  135: 
  136: export function cmdRegisterProject(options: {
  137:   root: string
  138:   name?: string
  139:   worktree?: string
  140:   branch?: string
  141:   quickStart?: boolean
  142:   heartbeatInterval?: string
  143:   refreshInterval?: string
  144:   autoPush?: string
  145:   generateReport?: string
  146:   reportPort?: string
  147: }): number {
  148:   const root = resolve(options.root)
  149:   const config = loadConfig()
  150:   const existingProject = findProjectForPath(config, root)
  151: 
  152:   if (options.quickStart && options.branch !== undefined) {
  153:     process.stderr.write('Quick Start uses the default memorytree branch. Omit --branch to customize it.\n')
  154:     return 1
  155:   }
  156: 
  157:   const requestedBranch = options.quickStart
  158:     ? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? defaultProjectWorktreeBranch()
  159:     : options.branch ?? existingProject?.memory_branch ?? DEFAULT_MEMORY_BRANCH
  160:   if (!isValidWorktreeBranchName(requestedBranch)) {
  161:     process.stderr.write(`Invalid MemoryTree branch name: ${requestedBranch}\n`)
  162:     return 1
  163:   }
  164: 
  165:   const heartbeatInterval = options.quickStart
  166:     ? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
  167:     : options.heartbeatInterval ?? existingProject?.heartbeat_interval ?? config.heartbeat_interval
  168:   const refreshInterval = options.quickStart
  169:     ? existingProject?.refresh_interval ?? QUICK_START_REFRESH_INTERVAL
  170:     : options.refreshInterval ?? existingProject?.refresh_interval ?? QUICK_START_REFRESH_INTERVAL
  171:   const autoPush = options.quickStart
  172:     ? existingProject?.auto_push ?? true
  173:     : parseOptionalBoolean(options.autoPush) ?? existingProject?.auto_push ?? config.auto_push
  174:   const generateReport = options.quickStart
  175:     ? existingProject?.generate_report ?? true
  176:     : parseOptionalBoolean(options.generateReport) ?? existingProject?.generate_report ?? config.generate_report
  177: 
  178:   const requestedPort = options.reportPort ? parseInt(options.reportPort, 10) : NaN
  179:   const reportPort = Number.isInteger(requestedPort) && requestedPort > 0 && requestedPort <= 65535
  180:     ? requestedPort
  181:     : existingProject?.report_port ?? config.report_port
  182: 
  183:   const updated = upsertProject(config, root, {
  184:     name: options.name ?? existingProject?.name ?? basename(root),
  185:     development_path: root,
  186:     memory_path: options.worktree
  187:       ? resolve(options.worktree)
  188:       : existingProject?.memory_path ?? defaultProjectWorktreePath(root),
  189:     memory_branch: requestedBranch,
  190:     heartbeat_interval: heartbeatInterval,
  191:     refresh_interval: refreshInterval,
  192:     auto_push: autoPush,
  193:     generate_report: generateReport,
  194:     report_port: reportPort,
  195:   })
  196: 
  197:   const project = findProjectForPath(updated, root)
  198:   if (!project) {
  199:     process.stderr.write(`Failed to register project: ${root}\n`)
  200:     return 1
  201:   }
  202: 
  203:   const worktree = ensureProjectWorktree(project)
  204:   saveConfig(updated)
  205:   let upstream: ReturnType<typeof ensureBranchUpstream> | null = null
  206:   let upstreamError = ''
  207:   if (project.auto_push) {
  208:     try {
  209:       upstream = ensureBranchUpstream(project.memory_path, worktree.branch)
  210:     } catch (error: unknown) {
  211:       upstreamError = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
  212:     }
  213:   }
  214: 
  215:   process.stdout.write(`Registered project: ${project.name}\n`)
  216:   process.stdout.write(`Development path: ${project.development_path}\n`)
  217:   process.stdout.write(`Memory path: ${project.memory_path}\n`)
  218:   process.stdout.write(`Memory branch: ${project.memory_branch}\n`)
  219:   process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat interval: ${project.heartbeat_interval}\n`)
  220:   process.stdout.write(`Refresh interval: ${project.refresh_interval}\n`)
  221:   process.stdout.write(`Auto-push: ${project.auto_push}\n`)
  222:   process.stdout.write(`Generate report: ${project.generate_report}\n`)
  223:   process.stdout.write(`Worktree branch: ${worktree.branch}\n`)
  224:   process.stdout.write(`Worktree created: ${worktree.created ? 'yes' : 'no'}\n`)
  225:   if (upstreamError) {
  226:     process.stderr.write(`Upstream configured: failed (${upstreamError})\n`)
  227:   } else if (upstream === null) {
  228:     process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: skipped (auto_push disabled)\n')
  229:   } else if (upstream.remote === null) {
  230:     process.stdout.write('Upstream configured: no remote available\n')
  231:   } else {
  232:     process.stdout.write(`Upstream configured: ${upstream.created ? 'yes' : 'already'} (${upstream.remote}/${worktree.branch})\n`)
  233:   }
  234:   return upstreamError ? 1 : 0
  235: }
  236: 
  237: export async function cmdQuickStart(options: {
  238:   root: string
  239:   name?: string
  240: }): Promise<number> {
  241:   const root = resolve(options.root)
  242:   const config = loadConfig()
  243:   const quickStartSeconds = intervalToSeconds(QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL)
  244:   const schedulerIntervalSeconds = registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds()
  245:   const effectiveSchedulerSeconds = schedulerIntervalSeconds ?? intervalToSeconds(config.heartbeat_interval)
  246:   const effectiveSchedulerLabel = schedulerIntervalSeconds === null
  247:     ? config.heartbeat_interval
  248:     : formatIntervalSeconds(schedulerIntervalSeconds)
  249: 
  250:   process.stdout.write('Quick Start: prepare scheduler, register this repository, and run one sync now.\n')
  251: 
  252:   if (!isHeartbeatRegistered()) {
  253:     process.stdout.write('Step 1/3: installing heartbeat scheduler with recommended defaults.\n')
  254:     const installResult = cmdInstall({ interval: QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL, autoPush: 'true' })
  255:     if (installResult !== 0) {
  256:       return installResult
  257:     }
  258:   } else if (effectiveSchedulerSeconds > quickStartSeconds) {
  259:     process.stdout.write(
  260:       `Step 1/3: heartbeat scheduler is registered at ${effectiveSchedulerLabel}; ` +
  261:       `reinstalling it to ${QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL} so Quick Start can run on time.\n`,
  262:     )
  263:     const uninstallResult = cmdUninstall()
  264:     if (uninstallResult !== 0) {
  265:       return uninstallResult
  266:     }
  267: 
  268:     const installResult = cmdInstall({
  269:       interval: QUICK_START_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL,
  270:       autoPush: config.auto_push ? 'true' : 'false',
  271:     })
  272:     if (installResult !== 0) {
  273:       return installResult
  274:     }
  275:   } else {
  276:     process.stdout.write(
  277:       `Step 1/3: heartbeat scheduler already registered at ${effectiveSchedulerLabel}; keeping the existing install.\n`,
  278:     )
  279:   }
  280: 
  281:   process.stdout.write('Step 2/3: registering the current repository with Quick Start settings.\n')
  282:   const registerOptions: Parameters<typeof cmdRegisterProject>[0] = {
  283:     root,
  284:     quickStart: true,
  285:   }
  286:   if (options.name !== undefined) {
  287:     registerOptions.name = options.name
  288:   }
  289: 
  290:   const registerResult = cmdRegisterProject(registerOptions)
  291:   if (registerResult !== 0) {
  292:     return registerResult
  293:   }
  294: 
  295:   process.stdout.write('Step 3/3: running one immediate heartbeat sync.\n')
  296:   return await cmdRunOnce({
  297:     root,
  298:     force: true,
  299:   })
  300: }
  301: 
  302: export function registeredHeartbeatIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  303:   const sys = platform
  304:   if (sys === 'linux') return cronRegisteredIntervalSeconds()
  305:   if (sys === 'darwin') return launchdRegisteredIntervalSeconds()
  306:   if (sys === 'win32') return schtasksRegisteredIntervalSeconds()
  307:   return null
  308: }
  309: 
  310: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  311: // Linux (cron)
  312: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  313: 
  314: function installCron(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
  315:   if (isCronRegistered()) {
  316:     process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in cron. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
  317:     return 1
  318:   }
  319: 
  320:   const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))
  321:   const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')
  322:   mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })
  323: 
  324:   const cronLine = `*/${minutes} * * * * node "${scriptPath}" daemon run-once >> "${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-cron.log')}" 2>&1 # memorytree`
  325:   const existing = getCrontab()
  326:   const newCrontab = existing.trim()
  327:     ? existing.trimEnd() + '\n' + cronLine + '\n'
  328:     : cronLine + '\n'
  329: 
  330:   try {
  331:     const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')
  332:     writeFileSync(tmpFile, newCrontab)
  333:     execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])
  334:     unlinkSync(tmpFile)
  335:   } catch {
  336:     process.stderr.write('Failed to install cron job.\n')
  337:     return 1
  338:   }
  339: 
  340:   process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in cron (every ${minutes}m).\n`)
  341:   return 0
  342: }
  343: 
  344: function uninstallCron(): number {
  345:   const existing = getCrontab()
  346:   const filtered = existing.split('\n').filter(line => !line.includes('memorytree')).join('\n') + '\n'
  347:   try {
  348:     const tmpFile = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', '.crontab.tmp')
  349:     mkdirSync(dirname(tmpFile), { recursive: true })
  350:     writeFileSync(tmpFile, filtered)
  351:     execCommand('crontab', [tmpFile])
  352:     unlinkSync(tmpFile)
  353:   } catch {
  354:     // best effort
  355:   }
  356:   process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from cron.\n')
  357:   return 0
  358: }
  359: 
  360: export function isCronRegistered(): boolean {
  361:   return getCrontab().includes('memorytree')
  362: }
  363: 
  364: function getCrontab(): string {
  365:   try {
  366:     return execCommand('crontab', ['-l'], { allowFailure: true })
  367:   } catch {
  368:     return ''
  369:   }
  370: }
  371: 
  372: function cronRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  373:   const line = getCrontab()
  374:     .split(/\r?\n/)
  375:     .find(candidate => candidate.includes('memorytree'))
  376:   if (!line) return null
  377: 
  378:   const match = line.match(/^\*\/(\d+)\s+\*\s+\*\s+\*\s+\*.*#\s*memorytree\s*$/)
  379:   if (!match) return null
  380: 
  381:   const minutes = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
  382:   return Number.isInteger(minutes) && minutes > 0 ? minutes * 60 : null
  383: }
  384: 
  385: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  386: // macOS (launchd)
  387: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  388: 
  389: function launchdPlistPath(): string {
  390:   return resolve(homedir(), 'Library', 'LaunchAgents', `${LAUNCHD_LABEL}.plist`)
  391: }
  392: 
  393: function installLaunchd(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
  394:   const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
  395:   if (existsSync(plistPath)) {
  396:     process.stderr.write("Heartbeat plist already exists. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
  397:     return 1
  398:   }
  399: 
  400:   const logDir = resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'logs')
  401:   mkdirSync(logDir, { recursive: true })
  402: 
  403:   const plistContent = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
  404: <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd">
  405: <plist version="1.0">
  406: <dict>
  407:     <key>Label</key>
  408:     <string>${LAUNCHD_LABEL}</string>
  409:     <key>ProgramArguments</key>
  410:     <array>
  411:         <string>node</string>
  412:         <string>${scriptPath}</string>
  413:         <string>daemon</string>
  414:         <string>run-once</string>
  415:     </array>
  416:     <key>StartInterval</key>
  417:     <integer>${seconds}</integer>
  418:     <key>StandardOutPath</key>
  419:     <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>
  420:     <key>StandardErrorPath</key>
  421:     <string>${resolve(logDir, 'heartbeat-launchd.log')}</string>
  422: </dict>
  423: </plist>
  424: `
  425:   mkdirSync(dirname(plistPath), { recursive: true })
  426:   writeFileSync(plistPath, plistContent, 'utf-8')
  427: 
  428:   try {
  429:     execCommand('launchctl', ['load', plistPath])
  430:   } catch {
  431:     process.stderr.write('Failed to load plist.\n')
  432:     return 1
  433:   }
  434: 
  435:   process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered via launchd (every ${seconds}s).\n`)
  436:   return 0
  437: }
  438: 
  439: function uninstallLaunchd(): number {
  440:   const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
  441:   if (existsSync(plistPath)) {
  442:     try { execCommand('launchctl', ['unload', plistPath], { allowFailure: true }) } catch { /* ignore */ }
  443:     try { unlinkSync(plistPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
  444:   }
  445:   process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from launchd.\n')
  446:   return 0
  447: }
  448: 
  449: export function isLaunchdRegistered(): boolean {
  450:   return existsSync(launchdPlistPath())
  451: }
  452: 
  453: function launchdRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  454:   const plistPath = launchdPlistPath()
  455:   if (!existsSync(plistPath)) return null
  456: 
  457:   try {
  458:     const text = readFileSync(plistPath, 'utf-8')
  459:     const match = text.match(/<key>StartInterval<\/key>\s*<integer>(\d+)<\/integer>/i)
  460:     if (!match) return null
  461: 
  462:     const seconds = parseInt(match[1]!, 10)
  463:     return Number.isInteger(seconds) && seconds > 0 ? seconds : null
  464:   } catch {
  465:     return null
  466:   }
  467: }
  468: 
  469: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  470: // Windows (Task Scheduler)
  471: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  472: 
  473: // Write a VBScript launcher that runs node silently (no console window).
  474: // wscript.exe /B runs in batch mode (suppresses script error popups).
  475: // VBScript Run(..., 0, False): 0 = SW_HIDE hides the window; False = fire-and-forget.
  476: // Written as UTF-16 LE with BOM so wscript.exe handles non-ASCII paths (e.g. Chinese
  477: // usernames) correctly on all Windows versions.
  478: export function vbsLauncherPath(): string {
  479:   return resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'heartbeat-launcher.vbs')
  480: }
  481: 
  482: export function writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath: string): string {
  483:   const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
  484:   mkdirSync(dirname(vbsPath), { recursive: true })
  485:   // Inside VBScript strings, double-quote is escaped as ""
  486:   const escapedScript = scriptPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
  487:   // Use the full node binary path so the launcher works even when Task Scheduler's
  488:   // PATH differs from the user's shell (e.g. nvm/fnm environments).
  489:   const escapedNode = process.execPath.replace(/"/g, '""')
  490:   const content = [
  491:     'Set WshShell = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")',
  492:     `WshShell.Run """${escapedNode}"" ""${escapedScript}"" daemon run-once", 0, False`,
  493:   ].join('\r\n') + '\r\n'
  494:   // UTF-16 LE BOM: recognised by wscript.exe on all Windows versions and preserves
  495:   // non-ASCII characters (e.g. Chinese home directory paths) without corruption.
  496:   const buf = Buffer.concat([Buffer.from([0xff, 0xfe]), Buffer.from(content, 'utf16le')])
  497:   writeFileSync(vbsPath, buf)
  498:   return vbsPath
  499: }
  500: 
  501: function installSchtasks(scriptPath: string, seconds: number): number {
  502:   if (isSchtasksRegistered()) {
  503:     process.stderr.write("Heartbeat is already registered in Task Scheduler. Use 'uninstall' first.\n")
  504:     return 1
  505:   }
  506: 
  507:   const minutes = Math.max(1, Math.floor(seconds / 60))
  508:   const vbsPath = writeVbsLauncher(scriptPath)
  509:   const trCommand = `wscript.exe /B "${vbsPath}"`
  510: 
  511:   try {
  512:     execCommand('schtasks', [
  513:       '/create', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/sc', 'minute', '/mo', String(minutes),
  514:       '/tr', trCommand, '/f',
  515:     ])
  516:   } catch {
  517:     // schtasks failed 鈥?remove the launcher file we just wrote to keep state clean
  518:     try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
  519:     process.stderr.write('Failed to create scheduled task.\n')
  520:     return 1
  521:   }
  522: 
  523:   process.stdout.write(`Heartbeat registered in Task Scheduler (every ${minutes}m).\n`)
  524:   return 0
  525: }
  526: 
  527: function uninstallSchtasks(): number {
  528:   try {
  529:     execCommand('schtasks', ['/delete', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/f'], { allowFailure: true })
  530:   } catch {
  531:     // best effort
  532:   }
  533:   const vbsPath = vbsLauncherPath()
  534:   if (existsSync(vbsPath)) {
  535:     try { unlinkSync(vbsPath) } catch { /* ignore */ }
  536:   }
  537:   process.stdout.write('Heartbeat removed from Task Scheduler.\n')
  538:   return 0
  539: }
  540: 
  541: export function isSchtasksRegistered(): boolean {
  542:   try {
  543:     execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME])
  544:     return true
  545:   } catch {
  546:     return false
  547:   }
  548: }
  549: 
  550: function schtasksRegisteredIntervalSeconds(): number | null {
  551:   try {
  552:     const xml = execCommand('schtasks', ['/query', '/tn', TASK_NAME, '/xml'], { allowFailure: true })
  553:     if (!xml.trim()) return null
  554: 
  555:     const match = xml.match(/<Interval>([^<]+)<\/Interval>/i)
  556:     if (!match) return null
  557: 
  558:     return parseIsoDurationToSeconds(match[1]!)
  559:   } catch {
  560:     return null
  561:   }
  562: }
  563: 
  564: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  565: // Helpers
  566: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  567: 
  568: export function heartbeatScriptPath(): string {
  569:   // Use process.argv[1] which is the actual script being executed,
  570:   // more reliable than import.meta.url which varies between tsx and bundled output
  571:   const scriptArg = process.argv[1] ?? ''
  572:   if (scriptArg && scriptArg.endsWith('cli.js')) {
  573:     return resolve(scriptArg)
  574:   }
  575:   return fallbackHeartbeatScriptPath(import.meta.url)
  576: }
  577: 
  578: export function fallbackHeartbeatScriptPath(moduleUrl: string): string {
  579:   const moduleDir = dirname(fileURLToPath(moduleUrl))
  580:   if (basename(moduleDir).toLowerCase() === 'dist') {
  581:     return resolve(moduleDir, 'cli.js')
  582:   }
  583:   return resolve(moduleDir, '..', '..', 'dist', 'cli.js')
  584: }
  585: 
  586: function parseOptionalBoolean(value: string | undefined): boolean | undefined {
  587:   if (value === undefined) return undefined
  588:   if (value === 'true') return true
  589:   if (value === 'false') return false
  590:   return undefined
  591: }
  592: 
  593: function parseIsoDurationToSeconds(value: string): number | null {
  594:   const match = value.trim().match(/^P(?:(\d+)D)?(?:T(?:(\d+)H)?(?:(\d+)M)?(?:(\d+)S)?)?$/i)
  595:   if (!match) return null
  596: 
  597:   const days = parseInt(match[1] ?? '0', 10)
  598:   const hours = parseInt(match[2] ?? '0', 10)
  599:   const minutes = parseInt(match[3] ?? '0', 10)
  600:   const seconds = parseInt(match[4] ?? '0', 10)
  601:   const total = (days * 86400) + (hours * 3600) + (minutes * 60) + seconds
  602:   return total > 0 ? total : null
  603: }
  604: 
  605: function formatIntervalSeconds(seconds: number): string {
  606:   if (seconds % 3600 === 0) return `${String(seconds / 3600)}h`
  607:   if (seconds % 60 === 0) return `${String(seconds / 60)}m`
  608:   return `${String(seconds)}s`
  609: }

   18: program
   19:   .command('init')
   20:   .description('Initialize MemoryTree files in a repository without registering heartbeat')
   21:   .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
   22:   .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
   23:   .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Initial goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
   24:   .option('--locale <locale>', 'Template locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
   25:   .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
   26:   .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
   27:   .option('--skip-agents', 'Deprecated 鈥?use upgrade instead')
   28:   .option('--force', 'Overwrite existing generated files')
   29:   .addHelpText('after', [
   30:     '',
   31:     'This command only creates repository files.',
   32:     'It does not register the repository with heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.',
   33:     '',
   34:     'If you want the default heartbeat setup afterwards:',
   35:     '  memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',

   49:   })
   50: 
   51: // 鈹€鈹€ upgrade 鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€
   52: 
   53: program
   54:   .command('upgrade')
   55:   .description('Upgrade repository files to MemoryTree without registering heartbeat')
   56:   .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
   57:   .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project name', 'this project')
   58:   .option('--goal-summary <text>', 'Fallback goal summary', 'Describe the long-term project goal here.')
   59:   .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale: auto, en, or zh-cn', 'auto')
   60:   .option('--date <date>', 'Override date as YYYY-MM-DD')
   61:   .option('--time <time>', 'Override time as HH:MM')
   62:   .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
   63:   .addHelpText('after', [
   64:     '',
   65:     'This command updates repository files only.',
   66:     'It does not register the repository with heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.',
   67:     '',
   68:     'If you want the default heartbeat setup afterwards:',
   69:     '  memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',
   70:   ].join('\n'))
   71:   .action(async (opts) => {
   72:     const { cmdUpgrade } = await import('./cmd-upgrade.js')
   73:     process.exitCode = cmdUpgrade({
   74:       root: opts.root,
   75:       projectName: opts.projectName,
   76:       goalSummary: opts.goalSummary,
   77:       locale: opts.locale,
   78:       date: opts.date ?? '',
   79:       time: opts.time ?? '',
   80:       format: opts.format,
   81:     })
   82:   })
   83: 
   84: // 鈹€鈹€ import 鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€
   85: 
   86: program
   87:   .command('import')
   88:   .description('Import one local transcript into MemoryTree archives')
   89:   .requiredOption('--source <path>', 'Raw transcript source file path')
   90:   .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
   91:   .option('--client <client>', 'Transcript client: auto, codex, claude, gemini, doubao', 'auto')
   92:   .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
   93:   .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
   94:   .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
   95:   .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
   96:   .option('--force-repo', 'Force writing to repo Memory/ (use for external imports like doubao)', false)
   97:   .action(async (opts) => {
   98:     const { cmdImport } = await import('./cmd-import.js')
   99:     process.exitCode = await cmdImport({
  100:       root: opts.root,
  101:       source: opts.source,
  102:       client: opts.client,
  103:       projectName: opts.projectName,
  104:       globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
  105:       rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
  106:       format: opts.format,
  107:       forceRepo: opts.forceRepo ?? false,
  108:     })
  109:   })

  111: // 鈹€鈹€ discover 鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€
  112: 
  113: program
  114:   .command('discover')
  115:   .description('Discover and import local AI transcripts')
  116:   .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  117:   .option('--client <client>', 'Client filter: all, codex, claude, gemini', 'all')
  118:   .option('--scope <scope>', 'Scope: current-project or all-projects', 'all-projects')
  119:   .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
  120:   .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
  121:   .option('--raw-upload-permission <perm>', 'Permission: not-set, approved, denied', 'not-set')
  122:   .option('--limit <n>', 'Limit discovered sources', '0')
  123:   .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  124:   .action(async (opts) => {
  125:     const { cmdDiscover } = await import('./cmd-discover.js')
  126:     process.exitCode = await cmdDiscover({
  127:       root: opts.root,
  128:       client: opts.client,
  129:       scope: opts.scope,
  130:       projectName: opts.projectName,
  131:       globalRoot: opts.globalRoot ?? '',
  132:       rawUploadPermission: opts.rawUploadPermission,
  133:       limit: parseInt(opts.limit, 10) || 0,
  134:       format: opts.format,
  135:     })
  136:   })

  139: 
  140: program
  141:   .command('locale')
  142:   .description('Detect the effective locale for a repository')

  144:   .option('--locale <locale>', 'Requested locale value', 'auto')
  145:   .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')

  155: // 鈹€鈹€ recall 鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€
  156: 
  157: program
  158:   .command('recall')
  159:   .description('On-demand transcript sync and latest session recall')
  160:   .option('--root <path>', 'Target repository root', '.')
  161:   .option('--project-name <name>', 'Project label', '')
  162:   .option('--global-root <path>', 'Override global transcript root')
  163:   .option('--activation-time <time>', 'ISO timestamp of session activation')
  164:   .option('--format <format>', 'Output format: text or json', 'text')
  165:   .action(async (opts) => {
  166:     const { cmdRecall } = await import('./cmd-recall.js')

  175: 
  176: // 鈹€鈹€ report 鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€
  177: 
  178: const report = program
  179:   .command('report')
  180:   .description('Build the MemoryTree HTML report site and preview it locally when needed')
  181:   .addHelpText('after', [
  182:     '',
  183:     'Local hosting guidance:',
  184:     '  Recommended for long-running local access:',
  185:     '    Use Caddy to host ./Memory/07_reports on your chosen port (for example 10010).',
  186:     '  Temporary fallback preview:',
  187:     '    memorytree report serve --dir ./Memory/07_reports --port 10010',
  188:   ].join('\n'))
  189: 
  190: report
  191:   .command('build')
  192:   .description('Build a self-contained HTML report website from Memory/')
  193:   .option('--root <path>', 'Repository root (must contain Memory/)', '.')
  194:   .option(
  195:     '--output <path>',
  196:     'Output directory (default: <root>/Memory/07_reports)',
  197:     '',
  198:   )
  199:   .option('--no-ai', 'Disable AI-generated session summaries')
  200:   .option(
  201:     '--model <model>',
  202:     'Claude model for AI summaries',
  203:     'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',
  204:   )
  205:   .option('--locale <locale>', 'Report locale: en or zh-CN', '')
  206:   .option('--report-base-url <url>', 'Absolute base URL for RSS and OG meta (e.g. https://memory.example.com)', '')
  207:   .addHelpText('after', [
  208:     '',
  209:     'After building, keep Caddy pointed at the output directory for long-running local access.',
  210:   ].join('\n'))
  211:   .action(async (opts) => {
  212:     const { cmdReportBuild } = await import('./cmd-report.js')
  213:     const root = opts.root as string
  214:     const rawOutput = opts.output as string
  215:     const output = rawOutput || `${root}/Memory/07_reports`
  216:     // Commander's --no-ai sets opts.ai = false
  217:     const noAi = opts.ai === false
  218:     const buildOpts = {
  219:       root,
  220:       output,
  221:       noAi,
  222:       model: opts.model as string,
  223:       ...((opts.locale as string) ? { locale: opts.locale as string } : {}),
  224:       ...((opts.reportBaseUrl as string) ? { reportBaseUrl: opts.reportBaseUrl as string } : {}),
  225:     }
  226:     process.exitCode = await cmdReportBuild(buildOpts)
  227:   })
  228: 
  229: report
  230:   .command('serve')
  231:   .description('Temporarily serve the generated report locally (fallback when Caddy is not used)')
  232:   .option(
  233:     '--dir <path>',
  234:     'Report directory to serve (default: ./Memory/07_reports)',
  235:     './Memory/07_reports',
  236:   )
  237:   .option('--port <n>', 'Port to listen on (default: ~/.memorytree/config.toml report_port or 10010)')
  238:   .addHelpText('after', [
  239:     '',
  240:     'Example:',
  241:     '  memorytree report serve --dir ./Memory/07_reports --port 10010',
  242:     '',
  243:     'Use this for temporary preview or as a fallback. For long-running local access, prefer Caddy.',
  244:   ].join('\n'))
  245:   .action(async (opts) => {
  246:     const [{ cmdReportServe }, { loadConfig, resolveReportPort }] = await Promise.all([
  247:       import('./cmd-report.js'),
  248:       import('../heartbeat/config.js'),
  249:     ])
  250:     const requestedPort = typeof opts.port === 'string' ? parseInt(opts.port, 10) : NaN
  251:     const resolvedDir = resolve(opts.dir as string)
  252:     const config = loadConfig()
  253:     process.exitCode = cmdReportServe({
  254:       dir: opts.dir as string,
  255:       port: Number.isInteger(requestedPort) && requestedPort > 0 && requestedPort <= 65535
  256:         ? requestedPort
  257:         : resolveReportPort(config, resolvedDir),
  258:     })
  259:   })
  260: 
  261: // 鈹€鈹€ daemon 鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€鈹€
  262: 
  263: const caddy = program
  264:   .command('caddy')
  265:   .description('Manage MemoryTree-owned Caddy config for long-running local report hosting')
  266:   .addHelpText('after', [
  267:     '',
  268:     'Scenario examples:',
  269:     '  Connect the current repository to Caddy:',
  270:     '    memorytree caddy enable --root .',
  271:     '  Check the current repository Caddy status:',
  272:     '    memorytree caddy status --root .',
  273:     '  Remove the current repository from MemoryTree-managed Caddy:',
  274:     '    memorytree caddy disable --root .',
  275:   ].join('\n'))
  276: 
  277: caddy
  278:   .command('enable')
  279:   .description('Write/update the current project Caddy fragment and reload Caddy')
  280:   .option('--root <path>', 'Project root that is already registered with MemoryTree', '.')
  281:   .action(async (opts) => {
  282:     const { cmdCaddyEnable } = await import('./cmd-caddy.js')
  283:     process.exitCode = await cmdCaddyEnable({
  284:       root: opts.root,
  285:     })
  286:   })
  287: 
  288: caddy
  289:   .command('disable')
  290:   .description('Remove the current project Caddy fragment and reload Caddy')
  291:   .option('--root <path>', 'Project root that is already registered with MemoryTree', '.')
  292:   .action(async (opts) => {
  293:     const { cmdCaddyDisable } = await import('./cmd-caddy.js')
  294:     process.exitCode = await cmdCaddyDisable({
  295:       root: opts.root,
  296:     })
  297:   })
  298: 
  299: caddy
  300:   .command('status')
  301:   .description('Show whether the current project is connected to MemoryTree-managed Caddy')
  302:   .option('--root <path>', 'Project root that is already registered with MemoryTree', '.')
  303:   .action(async (opts) => {
  304:     const { cmdCaddyStatus } = await import('./cmd-caddy.js')
  305:     process.exitCode = await cmdCaddyStatus({
  306:       root: opts.root,
  307:     })
  308:   })
  309: 
  310: const daemonHelpExamples = [
  311:   '',
  312:   'Scenario examples:',
  313:   '  First time on this machine:',
  314:   '    memorytree daemon install --interval 5m --auto-push true',
  315:   '  First time for the current repository:',
  316:   '    memorytree daemon register --root . --quick-start',
  317:   '  Run now without waiting:',
  318:   '    memorytree daemon run-once --root . --force',
  319:   '  One-command setup for the current repository:',
  320:   '    memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',
  321: ].join('\n')
  322: 
  323: const daemon = program
  324:   .command('daemon')
  325:   .description('Manage the MemoryTree heartbeat lifecycle')
  326:   .addHelpText('after', daemonHelpExamples)
  327: 
  328: daemon
  329:   .command('install')
  330:   .description('Register heartbeat with the OS scheduler')
  331:   .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override heartbeat interval (e.g., "5m")')
  332:   .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Override auto_push setting (true/false)')
  333:   .addHelpText('after', [
  334:     '',
  335:     'Example:',
  336:     '  memorytree daemon install --interval 5m --auto-push true',
  337:     '',
  338:     'Use this once per machine to enable the background scheduler.',
  339:   ].join('\n'))
  340:   .action(async (opts) => {
  341:     const { cmdInstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  342:     process.exitCode = cmdInstall({
  343:       interval: opts.interval,
  344:       autoPush: opts.autoPush,
  345:     })
  346:   })
  347: 
  348: daemon
  349:   .command('uninstall')
  350:   .description('Remove the heartbeat scheduled task')
  351:   .action(async () => {
  352:     const { cmdUninstall } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  353:     process.exitCode = cmdUninstall()
  354:   })
  355: 
  356: daemon
  357:   .command('run-once')
  358:   .description('Execute a single heartbeat cycle now')
  359:   .option('--root <path>', 'Run only the project that matches this path')
  360:   .option('--force', 'Run even when the project is not yet due')
  361:   .addHelpText('after', [
  362:     '',
  363:     'Example:',
  364:     '  memorytree daemon run-once --root . --force',
  365:     '',
  366:     'Use this when you want to sync immediately instead of waiting for the scheduler.',
  367:   ].join('\n'))
  368:   .action(async (opts) => {
  369:     const { cmdRunOnce } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  370:     process.exitCode = await cmdRunOnce({
  371:       root: opts.root,
  372:       force: opts.force ?? false,
  373:     })
  374:   })
  375: 
  376: daemon
  377:   .command('watch')
  378:   .description('Continuous heartbeat loop (development only)')
  379:   .option('--interval <interval>', 'Override interval')
  380:   .action(async (opts) => {
  381:     const { cmdWatch } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  382:     process.exitCode = await cmdWatch({ interval: opts.interval })
  383:   })
  384: 
  385: daemon
  386:   .command('status')
  387:   .description('Show heartbeat registration and lock state')
  388:   .action(async () => {
  389:     const { cmdStatus } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  390:     process.exitCode = cmdStatus()
  391:   })
  392: 
  393: daemon
  394:   .command('quick-start')
  395:   .description('Quick install: connect this repository to heartbeat with the recommended defaults')
  396:   .option('--root <path>', 'Development directory to quick-start', '.')
  397:   .option('--name <name>', 'Project display name')
  398:   .addHelpText('after', [
  399:     '',
  400:     'Example:',
  401:     '  memorytree daemon quick-start --root .',
  402:     '',
  403:     'This is the default first-time setup path when you want heartbeat for the current repository.',
  404:   ].join('\n'))
  405:   .action(async (opts) => {
  406:     const { cmdQuickStart } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  407:     process.exitCode = await cmdQuickStart({
  408:       root: opts.root,
  409:       name: opts.name,
  410:     })
  411:   })
  412: 
  413: daemon
  414:   .command('register')
  415:   .description('Advanced heartbeat setup for a repository with a dedicated MemoryTree worktree')
  416:   .option('--root <path>', 'Development directory to register', '.')
  417:   .option('--name <name>', 'Project display name')
  418:   .option('--worktree <path>', 'Override the dedicated MemoryTree worktree path')
  419:   .option('--quick-start', 'Use the recommended defaults: 5m heartbeat, 30m refresh, auto_push=true, generate_report=true')
  420:   .option('--branch <name>', 'Detailed setup only: override the dedicated MemoryTree branch name (default: memorytree)')
  421:   .option('--heartbeat-interval <interval>', 'Per-project heartbeat interval (e.g. 5m)')
  422:   .option('--refresh-interval <interval>', 'Per-project refresh interval for copying outputs back')
  423:   .option('--auto-push <bool>', 'Per-project auto_push value (true/false)')
  424:   .option('--generate-report <bool>', 'Per-project generate_report value (true/false)')
  425:   .option('--report-port <n>', 'Per-project local report port')
  426:   .addHelpText('after', [
  427:     '',
  428:     'Examples:',
  429:     '  Recommended defaults for the current repository:',
  430:     '    memorytree daemon register --root . --quick-start',
  431:     '  Advanced setup with custom values:',
  432:     '    memorytree daemon register --root . --heartbeat-interval 10m --refresh-interval 30m --auto-push true --generate-report true',
  433:     '',
  434:     'Use this command when you want to choose the branch, intervals, auto_push, report port, or worktree path yourself.',
  435:   ].join('\n'))
  436:   .action(async (opts) => {
  437:     const { cmdRegisterProject } = await import('./cmd-daemon.js')
  438:     process.exitCode = cmdRegisterProject({
  439:       root: opts.root,
  440:       name: opts.name,
  441:       worktree: opts.worktree,
  442:       branch: opts.branch,
  443:       quickStart: opts.quickStart ?? false,
  444:       heartbeatInterval: opts.heartbeatInterval,
  445:       refreshInterval: opts.refreshInterval,
  446:       autoPush: opts.autoPush,
  447:       generateReport: opts.generateReport,
  448:       reportPort: opts.reportPort,
  449:     })
  450:   })
  451: 
  452: program.parse()

    5: 
    6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { resolve, join } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import {
   10:   buildDatetime,
   11:   createMemoryDirs,
   12:   findExternalPolicySources,
   13:   resolveScaffoldPaths,
   14:   resolveTemplateDir,
   15:   scaffoldContentFiles,
   16:   writeTemplate,
   17: } from '../project/scaffold.js'
   18: import { resolveSkillRoot } from '../utils/path.js'
   19: 
   20: export interface InitOptions {
   21:   root: string
   22:   projectName: string
   23:   goalSummary: string
   24:   locale: string
   25:   date: string
   26:   time: string
   27:   skipAgents: boolean
   28:   force: boolean
   29: }
   30: 
   31: export function cmdInit(options: InitOptions): number {
   32:   const root = resolve(options.root)
   33:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
   34:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
   35:     return 1
   36:   }
   37: 
   38:   if (options.skipAgents) {
   39:     process.stderr.write(
   40:       '--skip-agents is not supported for fresh initialization. ' +
   41:       'Use memorytree upgrade when preserving or merging an existing AGENTS.md.\n',
   42:     )
   43:     return 1
   44:   }
   45: 
   46:   const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')
   47:   if (existsSync(agentsPath)) {
   48:     process.stderr.write(
   49:       'AGENTS.md already exists. Use memorytree upgrade to preserve or merge existing repo policy.\n',
   50:     )
   51:     return 1
   52:   }
   53: 
   54:   const policySources = findExternalPolicySources(root)
   55:   if (policySources.length > 0) {
   56:     const preview = policySources.slice(0, 3).join(', ') + (policySources.length > 3 ? ', ...' : '')
   57:     process.stderr.write(
   58:       `External repo policy files detected (${preview}). ` +
   59:       'Use memorytree upgrade to preserve host commit and PR rules.\n',
   60:     )
   61:     return 1
   62:   }
   63: 
   64:   const skillRoot = resolveSkillRoot(import.meta.url)
   65:   const templates = resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, options.locale)
   66:   const dt = buildDatetime(options.date, options.time)
   67: 
   68:   createMemoryDirs(root)
   69:   const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt)
   70:   scaffoldContentFiles(paths, templates, options.goalSummary, options.projectName, options.force)
   71:   writeTemplate(join(templates, 'agents.md'), agentsPath, options.force, {})
   72:   writeHeartbeatNextStep(root)
   73: 
   74:   return 0
   75: }
   76: 
   77: function writeHeartbeatNextStep(root: string): void {
   78:   const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
   79:   process.stdout.write(`Initialized MemoryTree files in: ${root}\n`)
   80:   process.stdout.write('This command did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
   81:   process.stdout.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
   82:   process.stdout.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)
   83: }

Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * CLI: memorytree upgrade 鈥?upgrade a repo to MemoryTree safely.
    3:  * Port of scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py CLI wrapper.
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { resolve } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import { normalizeLocale } from '../project/locale.js'
   10: import { buildDatetime, resolveTemplateDir } from '../project/scaffold.js'
   11: import { upgrade, formatResultText } from '../project/upgrade.js'
   12: import { resolveSkillRoot } from '../utils/path.js'
   13: 
   14: export interface UpgradeOptions {
   15:   root: string
   16:   projectName: string
   17:   goalSummary: string
   18:   locale: string
   19:   date: string
   20:   time: string
   21:   format: string
   22: }
   23: 
   24: export function cmdUpgrade(options: UpgradeOptions): number {
   25:   const root = resolve(options.root)
   26:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
   27:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
   28:     return 1
   29:   }
   30: 
   31:   const skillRoot = resolveSkillRoot(import.meta.url)
   32:   const templates = resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot, root, options.locale)
   33:   const effectiveLocale = normalizeLocale(options.locale, root)
   34:   const dt = buildDatetime(options.date, options.time)
   35: 
   36:   const result = upgrade(
   37:     root,
   38:     skillRoot,
   39:     templates,
   40:     effectiveLocale,
   41:     options.locale,
   42:     options.goalSummary,
   43:     options.projectName,
   44:     dt,
   45:   )
   46: 
   47:   if (options.format === 'json') {
   48:     process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(result) + '\n')
   49:     writeHeartbeatNextStep(root, process.stderr)
   50:   } else {
   51:     process.stdout.write(formatResultText(result) + '\n')
   52:     writeHeartbeatNextStep(root)
   53:   }
   54:   return 0
   55: }
   56: 
   57: function writeHeartbeatNextStep(
   58:   root: string,
   59:   stream: Pick<NodeJS.WriteStream, 'write'> = process.stdout,
   60: ): void {
   61:   const displayRoot = root.includes(' ') ? `"${root}"` : root
   62:   stream.write('This command updated repository files only.\n')
   63:   stream.write('It did not register heartbeat or modify ~/.memorytree/config.toml.\n')
   64:   stream.write('If you want the default heartbeat setup for this repository, run:\n')
   65:   stream.write(`  memorytree daemon quick-start --root ${displayRoot}\n`)
   66: }

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 1: /** 2: * Scaffold 鈥?directory init + template rendering. 3: * Port of scripts/_scaffold_ut...

Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Scaffold 鈥?directory init + template rendering.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_scaffold_utils.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, mkdirSync, readdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { join, relative } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   10: import { normalizeLocale } from './locale.js'
   11: 
   12: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   13: // Constants
   14: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   15: 
   16: export const MEMORY_DIRS: readonly string[] = [
   17:   'Memory/01_goals',
   18:   'Memory/02_todos',
   19:   'Memory/03_chat_logs',
   20:   'Memory/04_knowledge',
   21:   'Memory/05_archive',
   22: ]
   23: 
   24: export const CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS: readonly string[] = [
   25:   'CONTRIBUTING',
   26:   'CONTRIBUTING.md',
   27: ]
   28: 
   29: export const ALWAYS_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS: readonly string[] = [
   30:   'CODEOWNERS',
   31:   '.github/CODEOWNERS',
   32:   '.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md',
   33:   '.github/pull_request_template.md',
   34:   '.commitlintrc',
   35:   '.commitlintrc.json',
   36:   '.commitlintrc.yaml',
   37:   '.commitlintrc.yml',
   38:   '.commitlintrc.js',
   39:   '.commitlintrc.cjs',
   40:   'commitlint.config.js',
   41:   'commitlint.config.cjs',
   42:   'commitlint.config.mjs',
   43:   '.pre-commit-config.yaml',
   44:   '.pre-commit-config.yml',
   45: ]
   46: 
   47: const POLICY_TEXT_PATTERNS: readonly RegExp[] = [
   48:   /\bpull request\b/i, /\bmerge request\b/i, /\bpr\b/i,
   49:   /\bbranch(?:es)?\b/i, /\bprotected branch(?:es)?\b/i,
   50:   /\bcommit(?: message)?\b/i, /\bconventional commit(?:s)?\b/i,
   51:   /\breview(?:er|ers)?\b/i, /\bapproval(?:s)?\b/i,
   52:   /\bci\b/i, /\bpipeline(?:s)?\b/i, /\bauto-merge\b/i,
   53:   /\bpre-commit\b/i, /\bcodeowners\b/i,
   54:   /鎷夊彇璇锋眰/, /鍚堝苟璇锋眰/, /鍒嗘敮/, /鎻愪氦淇℃伅/, /鎻愪氦鏍囬/,
   55:   /璇勫/, /瀹℃壒/, /娴佹按绾?, /妫€鏌?, /鑷姩鍚堝苟/, /鎻愪氦瑙勮寖/,
   56: ]
   57: 
   58: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   59: // Types
   60: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   61: 
   62: export interface ScaffoldPaths {
   63:   readonly root: string
   64:   readonly goalDir: string
   65:   readonly todoDir: string
   66:   readonly chatDir: string
   67:   readonly goalPath: string
   68:   readonly todoPath: string
   69:   readonly chatPath: string
   70:   readonly goalVersion: string
   71:   readonly todoVersion: string
   72:   readonly previousVersion: string
   73:   readonly dateLabel: string
   74:   readonly timeLabel: string
   75: }
   76: 
   77: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   78: // DateTime helper
   79: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   80: 
   81: export function buildDatetime(dateValue: string, timeValue: string): Date {
   82:   if (dateValue && timeValue) {
   83:     return new Date(`${dateValue}T${timeValue}:00`)
   84:   }
   85:   if (dateValue) {
   86:     return new Date(`${dateValue}T00:00:00`)
   87:   }
   88:   if (timeValue) {
   89:     const today = new Date()
   90:     const y = today.getFullYear()
   91:     const m = String(today.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
   92:     const d = String(today.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
   93:     return new Date(`${y}-${m}-${d}T${timeValue}:00`)
   94:   }
   95:   return new Date()
   96: }
   97: 
   98: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   99: // Template resolution
  100: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  101: 
  102: export function resolveTemplateDir(skillRoot: string, root: string, localeValue: string): string {
  103:   const templatesRoot = join(skillRoot, 'assets', 'templates')
  104:   const localeName = normalizeLocale(localeValue, root)
  105:   const templateDir = join(templatesRoot, localeName)
  106:   if (!existsSync(templateDir)) {
  107:     throw new Error(`unsupported locale: ${localeValue}`)
  108:   }
  109:   return templateDir
  110: }
  111: 
  112: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  113: // Policy detection
  114: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  115: 
  116: export function findExternalPolicySources(root: string): string[] {
  117:   const matches = new Set<string>()
  118: 
  119:   for (const pattern of ALWAYS_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {
  120:     const p = join(root, pattern)
  121:     if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p)) {
  122:       matches.add(toPosixPath(relative(root, p)))
  123:     }
  124:   }
  125: 
  126:   for (const pattern of CONTENT_POLICY_SOURCE_PATTERNS) {
  127:     const p = join(root, pattern)
  128:     if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p) && hasPolicyContent(p)) {
  129:       matches.add(toPosixPath(relative(root, p)))
  130:     }
  131:   }
  132: 
  133:   return [...matches].sort()
  134: }
  135: 
  136: export function hasPolicyContent(filePath: string): boolean {
  137:   let text: string
  138:   try {
  139:     text = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8').toLowerCase()
  140:   } catch {
  141:     return true
  142:   }
  143:   return POLICY_TEXT_PATTERNS.some(pattern => pattern.test(text))
  144: }
  145: 
  146: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  147: // Version detection
  148: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  149: 
  150: export function findLatestVersion(folder: string, pattern: RegExp): string | null {
  151:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null
  152:   const versions: string[] = []
  153:   try {
  154:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
  155:       const match = pattern.exec(entry)
  156:       if (match?.[1]) {
  157:         versions.push(match[1])
  158:       }
  159:     }
  160:   } catch {
  161:     return null
  162:   }
  163:   return versions.length > 0 ? versions.sort().pop()! : null
  164: }
  165: 
  166: export function findLatestGoalFile(folder: string): string | null {
  167:   const regex = /^goal_v(\d{3})_(\d{8})\.md$/
  168:   const matches: Array<[string, string, string]> = []
  169:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null
  170:   try {
  171:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
  172:       const match = regex.exec(entry)
  173:       if (match) {
  174:         matches.push([match[1]!, match[2]!, join(folder, entry)])
  175:       }
  176:     }
  177:   } catch {
  178:     return null
  179:   }
  180:   if (matches.length === 0) return null
  181:   matches.sort()
  182:   return matches[matches.length - 1]![2]
  183: }
  184: 
  185: export function findLatestTodoVersion(folder: string, goalVersion: string): string | null {
  186:   const regex = new RegExp(`^todo_v${goalVersion}_(\\d{3})_\\d{8}\\.md$`)
  187:   const versions: string[] = []
  188:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null
  189:   try {
  190:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
  191:       const match = regex.exec(entry)
  192:       if (match?.[1]) versions.push(match[1])
  193:     }
  194:   } catch {
  195:     return null
  196:   }
  197:   return versions.length > 0 ? versions.sort().pop()! : null
  198: }
  199: 
  200: export function findLatestTodoFile(folder: string, goalVersion: string): string | null {
  201:   const regex = new RegExp(`^todo_v${goalVersion}_(\\d{3})_(\\d{8})\\.md$`)
  202:   const matches: Array<[string, string, string]> = []
  203:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null
  204:   try {
  205:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
  206:       const match = regex.exec(entry)
  207:       if (match) matches.push([match[1]!, match[2]!, join(folder, entry)])
  208:     }
  209:   } catch {
  210:     return null
  211:   }
  212:   if (matches.length === 0) return null
  213:   matches.sort()
  214:   return matches[matches.length - 1]![2]
  215: }
  216: 
  217: export function findLatestChatLogFile(folder: string): string | null {
  218:   const regex = /^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})_(\d{2}-\d{2})\.md$/
  219:   const matches: Array<[string, string, string]> = []
  220:   if (!existsSync(folder)) return null
  221:   try {
  222:     for (const entry of readdirSync(folder)) {
  223:       const match = regex.exec(entry)
  224:       if (match) matches.push([match[1]!, match[2]!, join(folder, entry)])
  225:     }
  226:   } catch {
  227:     return null
  228:   }
  229:   if (matches.length === 0) return null
  230:   matches.sort()
  231:   return matches[matches.length - 1]![2]
  232: }
  233: 
  234: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  235: // Template writing
  236: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  237: 
  238: export function writeTemplate(
  239:   templatePath: string,
  240:   targetPath: string,
  241:   force: boolean,
  242:   values: Record<string, string>,
  243: ): boolean {
  244:   if (existsSync(targetPath) && !force) return false
  245:   let content = readFileSync(templatePath, 'utf-8')
  246:   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(values)) {
  247:     content = content.replaceAll(`{{${key}}}`, value)
  248:   }
  249:   mkdirSync(join(targetPath, '..'), { recursive: true })
  250:   writeFileSync(targetPath, content, 'utf-8')
  251:   return true
  252: }
  253: 
  254: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  255: // Scaffold paths
  256: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  257: 
  258: export function resolveScaffoldPaths(root: string, dt: Date): ScaffoldPaths {
  259:   const y = dt.getFullYear()
  260:   const m = String(dt.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
  261:   const d = String(dt.getDate()).padStart(2, '0')
  262:   const hh = String(dt.getHours()).padStart(2, '0')
  263:   const mm = String(dt.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')
  264: 
  265:   const dateToken = `${y}${m}${d}`
  266:   const dateLabel = `${y}-${m}-${d}`
  267:   const timeLabel = `${hh}:${mm}`
  268:   const chatFilename = `${y}-${m}-${d}_${hh}-${mm}.md`
  269: 
  270:   const goalDir = join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals')
  271:   const todoDir = join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos')
  272:   const chatDir = join(root, 'Memory', '03_chat_logs')
  273: 
  274:   let goalVersion = findLatestVersion(goalDir, /^goal_v(\d{3})_\d{8}\.md$/)
  275:   if (goalVersion === null) goalVersion = '001'
  276:   const prevNum = parseInt(goalVersion, 10)
  277:   const previousVersion = prevNum > 1 ? `v${String(prevNum - 1).padStart(3, '0')}` : 'none'
  278: 
  279:   let todoVersion = findLatestTodoVersion(todoDir, goalVersion)
  280:   if (todoVersion === null) todoVersion = '001'
  281: 
  282:   const goalPath = findLatestGoalFile(goalDir) ?? join(goalDir, `goal_v${goalVersion}_${dateToken}.md`)
  283:   const todoPath = findLatestTodoFile(todoDir, goalVersion) ?? join(todoDir, `todo_v${goalVersion}_${todoVersion}_${dateToken}.md`)
  284:   const chatPath = findLatestChatLogFile(chatDir) ?? join(chatDir, chatFilename)
  285: 
  286:   return {
  287:     root,
  288:     goalDir,
  289:     todoDir,
  290:     chatDir,
  291:     goalPath,
  292:     todoPath,
  293:     chatPath,
  294:     goalVersion,
  295:     todoVersion,
  296:     previousVersion,
  297:     dateLabel,
  298:     timeLabel,
  299:   }
  300: }
  301: 
  302: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  303: // Directory creation
  304: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  305: 
  306: export function createMemoryDirs(root: string): string[] {
  307:   const created: string[] = []
  308:   for (const rel of MEMORY_DIRS) {
  309:     const p = join(root, rel)
  310:     if (!existsSync(p)) {
  311:       created.push(toPosixPath(rel))
  312:     }
  313:     mkdirSync(p, { recursive: true })
  314:   }
  315:   return created
  316: }
  317: 
  318: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  319: // Content scaffolding
  320: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  321: 
  322: export function scaffoldContentFiles(
  323:   paths: ScaffoldPaths,
  324:   templates: string,
  325:   goalSummary: string,
  326:   projectName: string,
  327:   force: boolean,
  328: ): { created: string[]; preserved: string[] } {
  329:   const created: string[] = []
  330:   const preserved: string[] = []
  331: 
  332:   const pairs: Array<[string, string, Record<string, string>]> = [
  333:     [
  334:       join(templates, 'goal.md'),
  335:       paths.goalPath,
  336:       {
  337:         GOAL_VERSION: paths.goalVersion,
  338:         DATE: paths.dateLabel,
  339:         PREVIOUS_VERSION: paths.previousVersion,
  340:         GOAL_SUMMARY: goalSummary.trim(),
  341:       },
  342:     ],
  343:     [
  344:       join(templates, 'todo.md'),
  345:       paths.todoPath,
  346:       {
  347:         GOAL_VERSION: paths.goalVersion,
  348:         TODO_SUBVERSION: paths.todoVersion,
  349:         DATE: paths.dateLabel,
  350:       },
  351:     ],
  352:     [
  353:       join(templates, 'chat-log.md'),
  354:       paths.chatPath,
  355:       {
  356:         DATE: paths.dateLabel,
  357:         TIME: paths.timeLabel,
  358:         PROJECT_NAME: projectName.trim(),
  359:       },
  360:     ],
  361:   ]
  362: 
  363:   for (const [templatePath, targetPath, values] of pairs) {
  364:     if (writeTemplate(templatePath, targetPath, force, values)) {
  365:       created.push(toPosixPath(relative(paths.root, targetPath)))
  366:     } else {
  367:       preserved.push(toPosixPath(relative(paths.root, targetPath)))
  368:     }
  369:   }
  370: 
  371:   return { created, preserved }
  372: }
  373: 
  374: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  375: // Internal helpers
  376: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  377: 
  378: function isFile(p: string): boolean {
  379:   try { return statSync(p).isFile() } catch { return false }
  380: }

Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Upgrade 鈥?upgrade detection + execution.
    3:  * Port of scripts/upgrade-memorytree.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, readFileSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { basename, join } from 'node:path'
    8: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    9: 
   10: import {
   11:   createMemoryDirs,
   12:   findExternalPolicySources,
   13:   findLatestChatLogFile,
   14:   findLatestGoalFile,
   15:   findLatestTodoFile,
   16:   resolveScaffoldPaths,
   17:   scaffoldContentFiles,
   18:   writeTemplate,
   19: } from './scaffold.js'
   20: 
   21: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   22: // State detection
   23: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   24: 
   25: export function detectState(root: string): string {
   26:   const memoryDir = join(root, 'Memory')
   27:   const goalDir = join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals')
   28:   const todoDir = join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos')
   29:   const chatDir = join(root, 'Memory', '03_chat_logs')
   30:   const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')
   31:   const policySources = findExternalPolicySources(root)
   32: 
   33:   const latestGoal = findLatestGoalFile(goalDir)
   34:   const goalVersion = extractGoalVersion(latestGoal)
   35:   const hasGoal = latestGoal !== null
   36:   const hasTodo = goalVersion !== null && findLatestTodoFile(todoDir, goalVersion) !== null
   37:   const hasChat = findLatestChatLogFile(chatDir) !== null
   38:   const hasAgents = existsSync(agentsPath) && isFile(agentsPath)
   39:   const agentsReady = hasAgents && !needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath)
   40: 
   41:   if (!existsSync(memoryDir)) {
   42:     return (hasAgents || policySources.length > 0) ? 'partial' : 'not-installed'
   43:   }
   44:   if (hasGoal && hasTodo && hasChat && agentsReady) {
   45:     return 'installed'
   46:   }
   47:   return 'partial'
   48: }
   49: 
   50: export function extractGoalVersion(filePath: string | null): string | null {
   51:   if (filePath === null) return null
   52:   const name = basename(toPosixPath(filePath))
   53:   const match = /^goal_v(\d{3})_\d{8}\.md$/.exec(name)
   54:   return match?.[1] ?? null
   55: }
   56: 
   57: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   58: // AGENTS.md completeness check (9 signals)
   59: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   60: 
   61: export function needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath: string): boolean {
   62:   let text: string
   63:   try {
   64:     text = readFileSync(agentsPath, 'utf-8').toLowerCase()
   65:   } catch {
   66:     return true
   67:   }
   68: 
   69:   const checks = [
   70:     hasReadOrderSignal(text),
   71:     hasMemoryLayoutSignal(text),
   72:     hasActiveTodoRule(text),
   73:     hasAppendOnlyChatLogRule(text),
   74:     hasRepoSafetyRule(text),
   75:     hasCommitTitleRule(text),
   76:     hasDedicatedMemorytreePrFlow(text),
   77:     hasMemorytreeOnlyScopeRule(text),
   78:     hasAutoMergeRule(text),
   79:   ]
   80:   return !checks.every(Boolean)
   81: }
   82: 
   83: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   84: // Signal detectors
   85: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   86: 
   87: function matchesAny(text: string, patterns: readonly RegExp[]): boolean {
   88:   return patterns.some(p => p.test(text))
   89: }
   90: 
   91: function matchesAllConcepts(text: string, groups: readonly (readonly RegExp[])[]): boolean {
   92:   return groups.every(patterns => matchesAny(text, patterns))
   93: }
   94: 
   95: export function hasReadOrderSignal(text: string): boolean {
   96:   return matchesAny(text, [
   97:     /\bread order\b/, /\bread .* in order\b/, /璇诲彇椤哄簭/, /鎸夋椤哄簭璇诲彇/,
   98:   ])
   99: }
  100: 
  101: export function hasMemoryLayoutSignal(text: string): boolean {
  102:   return matchesAllConcepts(text, [
  103:     [/memory\/01_goals/, /\b01_goals\b/],
  104:     [/memory\/02_todos/, /\b02_todos\b/],
  105:     [/memory\/03_chat_logs/, /\b03_chat_logs\b/],
  106:   ])
  107: }
  108: 
  109: export function hasActiveTodoRule(text: string): boolean {
  110:   return matchesAny(text, [
  111:     /keep .*todo .*synchron/,
  112:     /todo .*aligned .*active goal/,
  113:     /(sync|align|keep|maintain|bind).{0,50}(active|current).{0,20}todo.{0,50}(active|current).{0,20}goal/,
  114:     /(active|current).{0,20}todo.{0,50}(sync|align|match|bound).{0,50}(active|current).{0,20}goal/,
  115:     /褰撳墠寰呭姙蹇呴』涓庡綋鍓嶇洰鏍囦繚鎸佸悓姝?,
  116:     /寰呭姙蹇呴』涓庡綋鍓嶇洰鏍囦繚鎸佸悓姝?,
  117:   ])
  118: }
  119: 
  120: export function hasAppendOnlyChatLogRule(text: string): boolean {
  121:   return matchesAny(text, [
  122:     /append[- ]only .*chat log/,
  123:     /append[- ]only records/,
  124:     /treat chat logs as append[- ]only/,
  125:     /never rewrite or delete prior entries/,
  126:     /瀵硅瘽鏃ュ織鍙拷鍔?,
  127:     /绂佹閲嶅啓鎴栧垹闄ゆ棦鏈夊唴瀹?,
  128:   ])
  129: }
  130: 
  131: export function hasRepoSafetyRule(text: string): boolean {
  132:   return matchesAllConcepts(text, [
  133:     [/\bpr\b/, /\bpull request\b/, /\bmerge request\b/, /鎷夊彇璇锋眰/, /鍚堝苟璇锋眰/],
  134:     [/\bci\b/, /\bchecks?\b/, /\bpipeline\b/, /\be2e\b/, /妫€鏌?, /娴佹按绾?],
  135:     [/\breview(?:er|ers)?\b/, /\bapproval(?:s)?\b/, /璇勫/, /瀹℃壒/],
  136:     [/\bbranch(?:es)?\b/, /\bprotected branch(?:es)?\b/, /鍒嗘敮/],
  137:   ]) && matchesAny(text, [
  138:     /\brepository\b/, /\brepo\b/, /\bproject\b/, /\bhost\b/,
  139:     /\brule(?:s)?\b/, /\brequirement(?:s)?\b/, /\bpolicy\b/, /\bcontrol(?:s)?\b/,
  140:     /浠撳簱/, /瑙勫垯/, /瑕佹眰/,
  141:   ])
  142: }
  143: 
  144: export function hasCommitTitleRule(text: string): boolean {
  145:   return matchesAny(text, [
  146:     /\bmemorytree\([^)]*\):/, /\b[a-z]+\((memorytree)\):/,
  147:     /\bmemorytree:/, /memorytree-scoped commit title/,
  148:     /memorytree-specific commit title/, /use .*memorytree.*commit title/,
  149:     /鎻愪氦鏍囬.*memorytree/,
  150:   ])
  151: }
  152: 
  153: export function hasDedicatedMemorytreePrFlow(text: string): boolean {
  154:   return matchesAllConcepts(text, [
  155:     [/\bmemorytree\b/, /璁板繂/],
  156:     [/\bbranch(?:es)?\b/, /鍒嗘敮/],
  157:     [/\bpr\b/, /\bpull request\b/, /\bmerge request\b/, /鎷夊彇璇锋眰/, /鍚堝苟璇锋眰/],
  158:     [/\bdedicated\b/, /\bseparate\b/, /\bisolated\b/, /\bown\b/, /涓撶敤/, /鐙珛/],
  159:   ])
  160: }
  161: 
  162: export function hasMemorytreeOnlyScopeRule(text: string): boolean {
  163:   return matchesAny(text, [
  164:     /memorytree[- ]owned changes/,
  165:     /memorytree[- ]owned files/,
  166:     /memorytree-managed files/,
  167:     /(stage|push|commit).{0,40}only.{0,40}memorytree[- ]owned.{0,20}(files|changes)?/,
  168:     /(stage|push|commit).{0,40}only.{0,40}memorytree.{0,20}(files|changes|diff)/,
  169:     /only.{0,40}memorytree.{0,20}(files|changes|diff)/,
  170:     /浠呰嚜鍔ㄦ彁浜ゅ拰鎺ㄩ€?*memorytree.*鍙樻洿/,
  171:     /鐢?memorytree 绠＄悊/,
  172:   ])
  173: }
  174: 
  175: export function hasAutoMergeRule(text: string): boolean {
  176:   return matchesAny(text, [
  177:     /auto-merge only when .*permit/,
  178:     /only when repository rules permit/,
  179:     /only when repo rules permit/,
  180:     /only enable auto-merge when.{0,60}(required )?(approvals|checks|reviews?)/,
  181:     /auto-merge.{0,60}(required approvals|required checks|repository rules)/,
  182:     /浠呭湪浠撳簱瑙勫垯鍏佽鏃舵墠寮€鍚嚜鍔ㄥ悎骞?,
  183:   ])
  184: }
  185: 
  186: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  187: // Upgrade execution
  188: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  189: 
  190: export interface UpgradeResult {
  191:   state_before: string
  192:   state_after: string
  193:   requested_locale: string
  194:   effective_locale: string
  195:   created_dirs: string[]
  196:   created_files: string[]
  197:   preserved_files: string[]
  198:   agents_action: string
  199:   agents_merge_required: boolean
  200: }
  201: 
  202: export function upgrade(
  203:   root: string,
  204:   skillRoot: string,
  205:   templates: string,
  206:   effectiveLocale: string,
  207:   requestedLocale: string,
  208:   goalSummary: string,
  209:   projectName: string,
  210:   dt: Date,
  211: ): UpgradeResult {
  212:   const initialState = detectState(root)
  213: 
  214:   const createdDirs = createMemoryDirs(root)
  215:   const paths = resolveScaffoldPaths(root, dt)
  216:   const { created: createdFiles, preserved: preservedFiles } = scaffoldContentFiles(
  217:     paths, templates, goalSummary, projectName, false,
  218:   )
  219: 
  220:   const agentsPath = join(root, 'AGENTS.md')
  221:   let agentsAction = 'preserved_existing'
  222:   if (!existsSync(agentsPath)) {
  223:     const agentsTemplate = join(templates, 'agents.md')
  224:     if (existsSync(agentsTemplate) && writeTemplate(agentsTemplate, agentsPath, false, {})) {
  225:       createdFiles.push('AGENTS.md')
  226:       agentsAction = 'created'
  227:     }
  228:   } else {
  229:     preservedFiles.push('AGENTS.md')
  230:   }
  231:   const mergeRequired = agentsAction === 'preserved_existing' && needsAgentsMerge(agentsPath)
  232: 
  233:   return {
  234:     state_before: initialState,
  235:     state_after: detectState(root),
  236:     requested_locale: requestedLocale,
  237:     effective_locale: effectiveLocale,
  238:     created_dirs: createdDirs,
  239:     created_files: createdFiles,
  240:     preserved_files: preservedFiles,
  241:     agents_action: agentsAction,
  242:     agents_merge_required: mergeRequired,
  243:   }
  244: }
  245: 
  246: export function formatResultText(result: UpgradeResult): string {
  247:   const lines = [
  248:     `state_before: ${result.state_before}`,
  249:     `state_after: ${result.state_after}`,
  250:     `effective_locale: ${result.effective_locale}`,
  251:     `agents_action: ${result.agents_action}`,
  252:     `agents_merge_required: ${result.agents_merge_required}`,
  253:   ]
  254:   if (result.created_dirs.length > 0) {
  255:     lines.push('created_dirs:')
  256:     for (const item of result.created_dirs) lines.push(`- ${item}`)
  257:   }
  258:   if (result.created_files.length > 0) {
  259:     lines.push('created_files:')
  260:     for (const item of result.created_files) lines.push(`- ${item}`)
  261:   }
  262:   if (result.preserved_files.length > 0) {
  263:     lines.push('preserved_files:')
  264:     for (const item of result.preserved_files) lines.push(`- ${item}`)
  265:   }
  266:   return lines.join('\n')
  267: }
  268: 
  269: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  270: // Internal helpers
  271: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  272: 
  273: function isFile(p: string): boolean {
  274:   try { return statSync(p).isFile() } catch { return false }
  275: }

shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.4 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 1: /** 2: * Locale 鈥?project language detection. 3: * Port of scripts/_locale_utils.py 4: */ ...
