Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Locale 鈥?project language detection.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_locale_utils.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, readdirSync, statSync, openSync, readSync, closeSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { basename, join, extname } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   10: // Constants
   11: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   12: 
   13: const TEXT_EXTENSIONS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['.md', '.txt'])
   14: const CJK_RE = /[\u3400-\u4dbf\u4e00-\u9fff]/g
   15: const LATIN_RE = /[A-Za-z]/g
   16: const MIN_LATIN_SIGNAL = 3
   17: 
   18: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   19: // Public API
   20: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   21: 
   22: export function normalizeLocale(value: string, root?: string): string {
   23:   let normalized = (value ?? '').trim().toLowerCase()
   24:   if (normalized === '' || normalized === 'auto') {
   25:     normalized = (root ? detectRepoLocale(root) : null) ?? detectSystemLocale()
   26:   }
   27: 
   28:   const mapping: Record<string, string> = {
   29:     'en': 'en',
   30:     'en-us': 'en',
   31:     'en-gb': 'en',
   32:     'zh': 'zh-cn',
   33:     'zh-cn': 'zh-cn',
   34:     'zh-sg': 'zh-cn',
   35:     'zh-hans': 'zh-cn',
   36:     'zh-hant': 'zh-cn',
   37:     'zh-tw': 'zh-cn',
   38:     'zh-hk': 'zh-cn',
   39:   }
   40:   return mapping[normalized] ?? normalized
   41: }
   42: 
   43: export function detectRepoLocale(root: string): string | null {
   44:   if (!existsSync(root)) return null
   45: 
   46:   let zhScore = 0
   47:   let enScore = 0
   48: 
   49:   for (const filePath of iterRepoTextCandidates(root)) {
   50:     const name = basename(filePath).toLowerCase()
   51:     if (name.includes('zh-cn') || name.includes('zh_cn')) {
   52:       zhScore += 12
   53:     }
   54: 
   55:     const sample = readTextSample(filePath)
   56:     if (!sample) continue
   57: 
   58:     const cjkCount = (sample.match(CJK_RE) ?? []).length
   59:     const latinCount = (sample.match(LATIN_RE) ?? []).length
   60: 
   61:     if (cjkCount >= 8 && cjkCount >= Math.max(4, Math.floor(latinCount / 4))) {
   62:       zhScore += cjkCount
   63:     }
   64:     if (cjkCount === 0 && latinCount >= MIN_LATIN_SIGNAL) {
   65:       enScore += Math.max(latinCount, 12)
   66:       continue
   67:     }
   68:     if (latinCount >= 40 && latinCount >= Math.max(40, cjkCount * 4)) {
   69:       enScore += latinCount
   70:     }
   71:   }
   72: 
   73:   if (zhScore === 0 && enScore === 0) return null
   74:   if (zhScore === 0) return 'en'
   75:   if (enScore === 0) return 'zh-cn'
   76:   if (zhScore >= enScore * 1.25) return 'zh-cn'
   77:   if (enScore >= zhScore * 1.25) return 'en'
   78:   return null
   79: }
   80: 
   81: export function detectSystemLocale(): string {
   82:   const candidates = [
   83:     process.env['LC_ALL'],
   84:     process.env['LANG'],
   85:     process.env['LANGUAGE'],
   86:   ]
   87:   for (const candidate of candidates) {
   88:     const text = (candidate ?? '').toLowerCase()
   89:     if (text.startsWith('zh') || text.includes('chinese')) {
   90:       return 'zh-cn'
   91:     }
   92:   }
   93:   return 'en'
   94: }
   95: 
   96: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   97: // Internal helpers
   98: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   99: 
  100: function* iterRepoTextCandidates(root: string): Generator<string> {
  101:   const seen = new Set<string>()
  102: 
  103:   for (const rel of ['AGENTS.md', 'README.md', 'README.zh-CN.md', 'README.zh_CN.md']) {
  104:     const p = join(root, rel)
  105:     if (existsSync(p) && isFile(p)) {
  106:       seen.add(p)
  107:       yield p
  108:     }
  109:   }
  110: 
  111:   const topLevel: string[] = []
  112:   try {
  113:     for (const entry of readdirSync(root)) {
  114:       const p = join(root, entry)
  115:       if (isFile(p) && TEXT_EXTENSIONS.has(extname(p).toLowerCase()) && !seen.has(p)) {
  116:         topLevel.push(p)
  117:       }
  118:     }
  119:   } catch {
  120:     // ignore
  121:   }
  122:   topLevel.sort()
  123:   for (const p of topLevel.slice(0, 8)) {
  124:     seen.add(p)
  125:     yield p
  126:   }
  127: 
  128:   const docsDir = join(root, 'docs')
  129:   if (existsSync(docsDir) && isDir(docsDir)) {
  130:     let count = 0
  131:     for (const p of walkDir(docsDir)) {
  132:       if (count >= 12) break
  133:       if (!isFile(p) || !TEXT_EXTENSIONS.has(extname(p).toLowerCase()) || seen.has(p)) continue
  134:       seen.add(p)
  135:       count++
  136:       yield p
  137:     }
  138:   }
  139: }
  140: 
  141: function walkDir(dir: string): string[] {
  142:   const results: string[] = []
  143:   try {
  144:     for (const entry of readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
  145:       const p = join(dir, entry.name)
  146:       if (entry.isDirectory()) {
  147:         results.push(...walkDir(p))
  148:       } else if (entry.isFile()) {
  149:         results.push(p)
  150:       }
  151:     }
  152:   } catch {
  153:     // ignore
  154:   }
  155:   results.sort()
  156:   return results
  157: }
  158: 
  159: function readTextSample(filePath: string): string {
  160:   try {
  161:     const buf = Buffer.alloc(4096)
  162:     const fd = openSync(filePath, 'r')
  163:     const bytesRead = readSync(fd, buf, 0, 4096, 0)
  164:     closeSync(fd)
  165:     return buf.subarray(0, bytesRead).toString('utf-8')
  166:   } catch {
  167:     return ''
  168:   }
  169: }
  170: 
  171: function isFile(p: string): boolean {
  172:   try { return statSync(p).isFile() } catch { return false }
  173: }
  174: 
  175: function isDir(p: string): boolean {
  176:   try { return statSync(p).isDirectory() } catch { return false }
  177: }

    1: /**
    2:  * Report build orchestrator.
    3:  * Generates a self-contained multi-page HTML website in Memory/07_reports/.
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import {
    7:   existsSync,
    8:   mkdirSync,
    9:   readdirSync,
   10:   readFileSync,
   11:   writeFileSync,
   12:   appendFileSync,
   13:   rmSync,
   14: } from 'node:fs'
   15: import { basename, dirname, join } from 'node:path'
   16: 
   17: import type { BuildReportOptions } from '../types/report.js'
   18: import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptEvent } from '../types/transcript.js'
   19: import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
   20: import { computeStats, extractToolNames, accumulateToolCounts } from './stats.js'
   21: import { renderDashboard } from './render/dashboard.js'
   22: import { renderTranscriptList } from './render/transcript-list.js'
   23: import { renderTranscript } from './render/transcript.js'
   24: import type { RenderedMessage } from './render/transcript.js'
   25: import { renderKnowledge } from './render/knowledge.js'
   26: import { renderGoals } from './render/goals.js'
   27: import { renderTodos } from './render/todos.js'
   28: import { renderArchive } from './render/archive.js'
   29: import { renderProjects } from './render/projects.js'
   30: import { renderGraph } from './render/graph.js'
   31: import { buildSearchIndex, renderSearchPage } from './render/search.js'
   32: import { buildLinkGraph } from './render/links.js'
   33: import { renderRssFeed } from './render/rss.js'
   34: import { getSummary } from './summarize.js'
   35: import type { SummaryOptions } from './summarize.js'
   36: import { getTags } from './tags.js'
   37: import { loadLocale } from './i18n/index.js'
   38: import type { Translations } from './i18n/types.js'
   39: import { getLogger } from '../heartbeat/log.js'
   40: 
   41: const DEFAULT_MODEL = 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001'
   42: 
   43: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   44: // Main entry point
   45: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   46: 
   47: export async function buildReport(options: BuildReportOptions): Promise<void> {
   48:   const { root, output } = options
   49:   const noAi = options.noAi ?? false
   50:   const model = options.model ?? DEFAULT_MODEL
   51:   const locale = options.locale ?? 'en'
   52:   const ghPagesBranch = options.ghPagesBranch ?? ''
   53:   const cname = options.cname ?? ''
   54:   const webhookUrl = options.webhookUrl ?? ''
   55:   const newSessionIds = options.newSessionIds ?? []
   56:   const reportBaseUrl = options.reportBaseUrl ?? ''
   57:   const extraManifestDirs = options.extraManifestDirs ?? []
   58: 
   59:   // Cache lives outside the gitignored output dir so it survives rm -rf
   60:   const cacheDir = join(root, 'Memory', '.report-cache')
   61: 
   62:   // Load translations
   63:   const t: Translations = loadLocale(locale)
   64: 
   65:   clearOutputDir(output)
   66: 
   67:   // Ensure output dirs exist
   68:   mkdirSync(output, { recursive: true })
   69:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'transcripts'), { recursive: true })
   70:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'goals'), { recursive: true })
   71:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'knowledge'), { recursive: true })
   72:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'todos'), { recursive: true })
   73:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'archive'), { recursive: true })
   74:   mkdirSync(join(output, 'projects'), { recursive: true })
   75:   mkdirSync(cacheDir, { recursive: true })
   76: 
   77:   // Ensure Memory/07_reports is gitignored
   78:   ensureGitignore(root, 'Memory/07_reports/')
   79: 
   80:   // Load all manifests (own project + extra registered projects)
   81:   const manifests = [
   82:     ...loadManifests(root),
   83:     ...extraManifestDirs.flatMap(dir => loadManifestsFromDir(dir)),
   84:   ]
   85: 
   86:   // Build link graph from clean markdown
   87:   const linkGraph = buildLinkGraph(manifests, root)
   88: 
   89:   // Accumulate tool counts while processing transcripts
   90:   let toolCounts: Record<string, number> = {}
   91: 
   92:   // Summary options
   93:   const summaryOptions: SummaryOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
   94: 
   95:   // Process each transcript: parse 鈫?summarize 鈫?render 鈫?write 鈫?discard
   96:   const snippets: Record<string, string> = {}
   97:   const searchTexts: Record<string, string> = {}
   98:   const summaries: Record<string, string> = {}
   99:   const summaryPromises: Array<Promise<void>> = []
  100: 
  101:   for (const m of manifests) {
  102:     const parsedTranscript = loadStructuredTranscript(m, root)
  103:     const messages = parsedTranscript
  104:       ? parsedTranscript.messages.map(toRenderedMessage)
  105:       : parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m, root)
  106:     const events = parsedTranscript?.events ?? []
  107: 
  108:     if (events.length > 0) {
  109:       toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, extractToolNamesFromEvents(events))
  110:     } else {
  111:       const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
  112:       if (rawPath && existsSync(rawPath)) {
  113:       try {
  114:         const toolSummaries = extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath, m.client)
  115:         const names = extractToolNames(toolSummaries)
  116:         toolCounts = accumulateToolCounts(toolCounts, names)
  117:       } catch {
  118:         // Skip if raw parsing fails
  119:       }
  120:       }
  121:     }
  122: 
  123:     const firstMsg = messages[0]
  124:     snippets[m.session_id] = firstMsg ? firstMsg.text.slice(0, 300) : snippetFromEvents(events)
  125:     searchTexts[m.session_id] = buildSearchText(messages, events)
  126: 
  127:     // Summarize + render (deferred to allow parallel API calls)
  128:     const manifest = m
  129:     const msgs = messages
  130:     const transcriptEvents = events
  131:     summaryPromises.push(
  132:       (async () => {
  133:         try {
  134:         const summary = await getSummary(manifest.raw_sha256, msgs, summaryOptions)
  135:         summaries[manifest.session_id] = summary
  136:         const backlinkIds = linkGraph.backlinks[manifest.session_id] ?? []
  137:         const backlinkManifests = backlinkIds
  138:           .map(id => manifests.find(x => x.session_id === id))
  139:           .filter((x): x is ManifestEntry => x !== undefined)
  140: 
  141:         const html = renderTranscript(
  142:           msgs,
  143:           manifest,
  144:           summary,
  145:           backlinkManifests,
  146:           t,
  147:           reportBaseUrl,
  148:           transcriptEvents,
  149:         )
  150:         const outPath = transcriptOutputPath(output, manifest)
  151:         mkdirSync(dirname(outPath), { recursive: true })
  152:         writeFileSync(outPath, html, 'utf-8')
  153:         } catch (err: unknown) {
  154:           // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
  155:           getLogger().warn(`[build] Failed to render ${manifest.session_id}: ${String(err)}`)
  156:         }
  157:       })(),
  158:     )
  159:   }
  160: 
  161:   // Wait for all transcript renders (parallel, bounded by semaphore in summarize.ts)
  162:   await Promise.all(summaryPromises)
  163: 
  164:   // Extract tags in parallel (after summaries are ready)
  165:   const tagOptions = { cacheDir, noAi, model }
  166:   const tags: Record<string, string[]> = {}
  167:   await Promise.all(
  168:     manifests.map(async m => {
  169:       const summary = summaries[m.session_id] ?? ''
  170:       tags[m.session_id] = await getTags(m.raw_sha256, summary, tagOptions)
  171:     }),
  172:   )
  173: 
  174:   // Compute final stats with accumulated tool counts
  175:   const stats = computeStats(manifests, toolCounts)
  176: 
  177:   // Load markdown content for various pages
  178:   const goalFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '01_goals'))
  179:   const todoFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '02_todos'))
  180:   const knowledgeFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '04_knowledge'))
  181:   const archiveFiles = loadMarkdownFiles(join(root, 'Memory', '05_archive'))
  182: 
  183:   // Dashboard
  184:   writeFileSync(join(output, 'index.html'), renderDashboard(stats, manifests, t), 'utf-8')
  185: 
  186:   // Session list
  187:   writeFileSync(
  188:     join(output, 'transcripts', 'index.html'),
  189:     renderTranscriptList(manifests, t, summaries, tags),
  190:     'utf-8',
  191:   )
  192: 
  193:   // Goals page
  194:   writeFileSync(
  195:     join(output, 'goals', 'index.html'),
  196:     renderGoals(goalFiles, t),
  197:     'utf-8',
  198:   )
  199: 
  200:   // Knowledge page
  201:   writeFileSync(
  202:     join(output, 'knowledge', 'index.html'),
  203:     renderKnowledge(knowledgeFiles, t),
  204:     'utf-8',
  205:   )
  206: 
  207:   // Todos page
  208:   writeFileSync(
  209:     join(output, 'todos', 'index.html'),
  210:     renderTodos(todoFiles, t),
  211:     'utf-8',
  212:   )
  213: 
  214:   // Archive page
  215:   writeFileSync(
  216:     join(output, 'archive', 'index.html'),
  217:     renderArchive(archiveFiles, t),
  218:     'utf-8',
  219:   )
  220: 
  221:   // Projects page
  222:   writeFileSync(
  223:     join(output, 'projects', 'index.html'),
  224:     renderProjects(manifests, t),
  225:     'utf-8',
  226:   )
  227: 
  228:   // Knowledge graph
  229:   writeFileSync(
  230:     join(output, 'graph.html'),
  231:     renderGraph(manifests, knowledgeFiles, linkGraph, t),
  232:     'utf-8',
  233:   )
  234: 
  235:   // Search
  236:   const searchIndex = buildSearchIndex(
  237:     manifests,
  238:     m => snippets[m.session_id] ?? '',
  239:     m => searchTexts[m.session_id] ?? snippets[m.session_id] ?? '',
  240:   )
  241:   writeFileSync(join(output, 'search.html'), renderSearchPage(searchIndex, t), 'utf-8')
  242: 
  243:   // RSS Feed
  244:   writeFileSync(join(output, 'feed.xml'), renderRssFeed(manifests, summaries, reportBaseUrl), 'utf-8')
  245: 
  246:   // GitHub Pages deployment (non-blocking on failure)
  247:   if (ghPagesBranch) {
  248:     try {
  249:       const { deployGithubPages } = await import('./deploy/github-pages.js')
  250:       await deployGithubPages({ repoRoot: root, outputDir: output, branch: ghPagesBranch, cname })
  251:     } catch {
  252:       // Logged inside deployGithubPages
  253:     }
  254:   } else if (cname) {
  255:     // Write CNAME even without deploy (writeFileSync already imported at top)
  256:     writeFileSync(join(output, 'CNAME'), cname + '\n', 'utf-8')
  257:   }
  258: 
  259:   // Webhook notification (non-blocking on failure)
  260:   if (webhookUrl) {
  261:     try {
  262:       const { sendWebhook } = await import('./deploy/webhook.js')
  263:       await sendWebhook({
  264:         url: webhookUrl,
  265:         sessionCount: manifests.length,
  266:         newSessionIds,
  267:       })
  268:     } catch {
  269:       // Logged inside sendWebhook
  270:     }
  271:   }
  272: }
  273: 
  274: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  275: // Manifest loading
  276: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  277: 
  278: function loadManifests(root: string): ManifestEntry[] {
  279:   const manifestsDir = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts', 'manifests')
  280:   return loadManifestsFromDir(manifestsDir)
  281: }
  282: 
  283: function loadManifestsFromDir(manifestsDir: string): ManifestEntry[] {
  284:   if (!existsSync(manifestsDir)) return []
  285:   const manifests: ManifestEntry[] = []
  286:   loadManifestsRecursive(manifestsDir, manifests)
  287:   return manifests
  288: }
  289: 
  290: function loadManifestsRecursive(dir: string, out: ManifestEntry[]): void {
  291:   let entries: string[]
  292:   try {
  293:     entries = readdirSync(dir)
  294:   } catch {
  295:     return
  296:   }
  297: 
  298:   for (const entry of entries) {
  299:     const fullPath = join(dir, entry)
  300:     if (entry.endsWith('.json')) {
  301:       try {
  302:         const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
  303:         const parsed: unknown = JSON.parse(raw)
  304:         if (
  305:           parsed !== null &&
  306:           typeof parsed === 'object' &&
  307:           typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['session_id'] === 'string' &&
  308:           typeof (parsed as Record<string, unknown>)['client'] === 'string'
  309:         ) {
  310:           out.push(parsed as ManifestEntry)
  311:         }
  312:       } catch {
  313:         // Skip malformed manifests
  314:       }
  315:     } else {
  316:       // Recurse into subdirectories
  317:       loadManifestsRecursive(fullPath, out)
  318:     }
  319:   }
  320: }
  321: 
  322: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  323: // Clean markdown message parsing
  324: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  325: 
  326: /** Parse messages from a clean markdown file. */
  327: export function parseCleanMarkdownMessages(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): RenderedMessage[] {
  328:   const repoPath = m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : null
  329:   const cleanPath = (repoPath && existsSync(repoPath)) ? repoPath : m.global_clean_path
  330:   if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return []
  331: 
  332:   let content: string
  333:   try {
  334:     content = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
  335:   } catch {
  336:     return []
  337:   }
  338: 
  339:   return parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content)
  340: }
  341: 
  342: /** Extract role/timestamp/text from clean markdown format. */
  343: export function parseMessagesFromMarkdown(content: string): RenderedMessage[] {
  344:   const messages: RenderedMessage[] = []
  345: 
  346:   // Find ## Messages section
  347:   const msgSection = content.indexOf('\n## Messages')
  348:   if (msgSection === -1) return []
  349: 
  350:   const body = content.slice(msgSection + 12) // after "## Messages\n"
  351: 
  352:   // Split on ### N. role headers
  353:   const msgRe = /^### \d+\.\s+(\w+)/gm
  354:   let match: RegExpExecArray | null
  355:   const starts: Array<{ index: number; role: string }> = []
  356: 
  357:   while ((match = msgRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
  358:     starts.push({ index: match.index, role: match[1] ?? 'unknown' })
  359:   }
  360: 
  361:   for (let i = 0; i < starts.length; i++) {
  362:     const start = starts[i]
  363:     if (!start) continue
  364:     const nextStart = starts[i + 1]
  365:     const chunk = nextStart
  366:       ? body.slice(start.index, nextStart.index)
  367:       : body.slice(start.index)
  368: 
  369:     const lines = chunk.split('\n')
  370:     // First line is the header, second may be timestamp
  371:     let timestamp = ''
  372:     const textLines: string[] = []
  373:     let pastHeader = false
  374: 
  375:     for (const line of lines) {
  376:       if (!pastHeader && line.startsWith('### ')) {
  377:         pastHeader = true
  378:         continue
  379:       }
  380:       if (!pastHeader) continue
  381:       const tsMatch = line.match(/^- Timestamp:\s*`([^`]+)`/)
  382:       if (tsMatch && !timestamp) {
  383:         timestamp = tsMatch[1] ?? ''
  384:         continue
  385:       }
  386:       textLines.push(line)
  387:     }
  388: 
  389:     // Remove leading/trailing blank lines from text
  390:     const text = textLines.join('\n').trim()
  391:     if (text || timestamp) {
  392:       messages.push({ role: start.role, timestamp, text })
  393:     }
  394:   }
  395: 
  396:   return messages
  397: }
  398: 
  399: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  400: // Raw transcript tool extraction
  401: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  402: 
  403: /** Best-effort extraction of tool event summaries from a raw JSONL file. */
  404: function extractToolSummariesFromRaw(rawPath: string, _client: string): string[] {
  405:   const summaries: string[] = []
  406:   let content: string
  407:   try {
  408:     content = readFileSync(rawPath, 'utf-8')
  409:   } catch {
  410:     return []
  411:   }
  412: 
  413:   for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
  414:     const trimmed = line.trim()
  415:     if (!trimmed) continue
  416:     try {
  417:       const record = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
  418:       // Codex: function_call type
  419:       const type = record['type'] as string | undefined
  420:       if (type === 'function_call' || type === 'custom_tool_call') {
  421:         const name = (record['name'] as string | undefined) ?? type
  422:         summaries.push(name)
  423:         continue
  424:       }
  425:       // Claude: tool_use content blocks
  426:       const payload = record['message'] as Record<string, unknown> | undefined
  427:       const content2 = (payload?.['content'] ?? record['content']) as unknown[] | undefined
  428:       if (Array.isArray(content2)) {
  429:         for (const block of content2) {
  430:           if (
  431:             block !== null &&
  432:             typeof block === 'object' &&
  433:             (block as Record<string, unknown>)['type'] === 'tool_use'
  434:           ) {
  435:             const name = ((block as Record<string, unknown>)['name'] as string | undefined) ?? 'tool_use'
  436:             summaries.push(name)
  437:           }
  438:         }
  439:       }
  440:     } catch {
  441:       // Skip malformed lines
  442:     }
  443:   }
  444: 
  445:   return summaries
  446: }
  447: 
  448: function extractToolNamesFromEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string[] {
  449:   return events
  450:     .filter((event): event is Extract<TranscriptEvent, { kind: 'tool_call' }> => event.kind === 'tool_call')
  451:     .map(event => event.tool_name)
  452: }
  453: 
  454: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  455: // Output path helpers
  456: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  457: 
  458: function transcriptOutputPath(output: string, m: ManifestEntry): string {
  459:   const cleanPath = m.repo_clean_path || m.global_clean_path || ''
  460:   const stem = cleanPath ? basename(cleanPath, '.md') : m.session_id
  461:   return join(output, 'transcripts', m.client, `${stem}.html`)
  462: }
  463: 
  464: function resolveRawPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
  465:   if (m.repo_raw_path) {
  466:     const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_raw_path)
  467:     if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath
  468:   }
  469:   if (m.global_raw_path) {
  470:     return m.global_raw_path
  471:   }
  472:   return null
  473: }
  474: 
  475: function resolveFullPath(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): string | null {
  476:   if (m.repo_full_path) {
  477:     const repoPath = join(root, m.repo_full_path)
  478:     if (existsSync(repoPath)) return repoPath
  479:   }
  480:   if (m.global_full_path && existsSync(m.global_full_path)) {
  481:     return m.global_full_path
  482:   }
  483:   const derivedRepoPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.repo_clean_path ? join(root, m.repo_clean_path) : '')
  484:   if (derivedRepoPath) {
  485:     return derivedRepoPath
  486:   }
  487:   const derivedGlobalPath = deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(m.global_clean_path)
  488:   if (derivedGlobalPath) {
  489:     return derivedGlobalPath
  490:   }
  491:   return null
  492: }
  493: 
  494: function loadNormalizedTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {
  495:   const fullPath = resolveFullPath(m, root)
  496:   if (!fullPath) return null
  497: 
  498:   try {
  499:     const raw = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
  500:     const parsed = JSON.parse(raw) as Record<string, unknown>
  501:     if (
  502:       !Array.isArray(parsed['messages']) ||
  503:       !Array.isArray(parsed['tool_events']) ||
  504:       !Array.isArray(parsed['events'])
  505:     ) {
  506:       return null
  507:     }
  508: 
  509:     return {
  510:       client: String(parsed['client'] ?? m.client) as ParsedTranscript['client'],
  511:       session_id: String(parsed['session_id'] ?? m.session_id),
  512:       title: String(parsed['title'] ?? m.title),
  513:       started_at: String(parsed['started_at'] ?? m.started_at),
  514:       cwd: String(parsed['cwd'] ?? m.cwd),
  515:       branch: String(parsed['branch'] ?? m.branch),
  516:       messages: parsed['messages'] as ParsedTranscript['messages'],
  517:       tool_events: parsed['tool_events'] as ParsedTranscript['tool_events'],
  518:       events: parsed['events'] as ParsedTranscript['events'],
  519:       source_path: String(parsed['source_path'] ?? m.raw_source_path),
  520:     }
  521:   } catch {
  522:     return null
  523:   }
  524: }
  525: 
  526: function loadStructuredTranscript(m: ManifestEntry, root: string): ParsedTranscript | null {
  527:   const normalizedTranscript = loadNormalizedTranscript(m, root)
  528:   if (normalizedTranscript) {
  529:     return normalizedTranscript
  530:   }
  531: 
  532:   const rawPath = resolveRawPath(m, root)
  533:   if (!rawPath || !existsSync(rawPath)) {
  534:     return null
  535:   }
  536: 
  537:   try {
  538:     return parseTranscript(m.client, rawPath)
  539:   } catch {
  540:     return null
  541:   }
  542: }
  543: 
  544: function deriveFullPathFromCleanPath(cleanPath: string): string | null {
  545:   if (!cleanPath || !existsSync(cleanPath)) return null
  546:   const fullPath = cleanPath
  547:     .replace(/[\\/]clean[\\/]/, '/full/')
  548:     .replace(/\.md$/i, '.json')
  549:   return existsSync(fullPath) ? fullPath : null
  550: }
  551: 
  552: function toRenderedMessage(message: ParsedTranscript['messages'][number]): RenderedMessage {
  553:   return {
  554:     role: message.role,
  555:     timestamp: message.timestamp ?? '',
  556:     text: message.text,
  557:   }
  558: }
  559: 
  560: function snippetFromEvents(events: TranscriptEvent[]): string {
  561:   for (const event of events) {
  562:     if (event.kind === 'message') {
  563:       return event.text.slice(0, 300)
  564:     }
  565:     if (event.kind === 'reasoning') {
  566:       const text = event.text || event.summary || ''
  567:       if (text) return text.slice(0, 300)
  568:     }
  569:     if (event.summary) {
  570:       return event.summary.slice(0, 300)
  571:     }
  572:   }
  573:   return ''
  574: }
  575: 
  576: function buildSearchText(messages: RenderedMessage[], events: TranscriptEvent[]): string {
  577:   const headParts: string[] = []
  578:   const bodyParts: string[] = []
  579: 
  580:   if (events.length > 0) {
  581:     for (const event of events) {
  582:       if (event.kind === 'message') {
  583:         bodyParts.push(event.role, event.text)
  584:         continue
  585:       }
  586:       if (event.kind === 'reasoning') {
  587:         headParts.push(event.text || event.summary || 'reasoning')
  588:         continue
  589:       }
  590:       if (event.kind === 'tool_call' || event.kind === 'tool_result') {
  591:         headParts.push(event.tool_name, event.summary || '')
  592:         continue
  593:       }
  594:       if (event.title) {
  595:         headParts.push(event.title)
  596:       }
  597:       if (event.summary) {
  598:         headParts.push(event.summary)
  599:       }
  600:     }
  601:   } else {
  602:     for (const message of messages) {
  603:       bodyParts.push(message.role, message.text)
  604:     }
  605:   }
  606: 
  607:   return normalizeSearchText([...headParts, ...bodyParts].join('\n')).slice(0, 1600)
  608: }
  609: 
  610: function normalizeSearchText(text: string): string {
  611:   return text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
  612: }
  613: 
  614: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  615: // Markdown file loader (for goals/knowledge/todos/archive)
  616: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  617: 
  618: function loadMarkdownFiles(dir: string): Array<{ filename: string; title: string; content: string }> {
  619:   if (!existsSync(dir)) return []
  620: 
  621:   let entries: string[]
  622:   try {
  623:     entries = readdirSync(dir)
  624:   } catch {
  625:     return []
  626:   }
  627: 
  628:   return entries
  629:     .filter(e => e.endsWith('.md'))
  630:     .sort()
  631:     .map(filename => {
  632:       const fullPath = join(dir, filename)
  633:       let content = ''
  634:       try {
  635:         content = readFileSync(fullPath, 'utf-8')
  636:       } catch {
  637:         // empty
  638:       }
  639:       const title = extractMarkdownTitle(content) || basename(filename, '.md')
  640:       return { filename, title, content }
  641:     })
  642: }
  643: 
  644: function clearOutputDir(output: string): void {
  645:   if (!existsSync(output)) return
  646: 
  647:   let entries: string[]
  648:   try {
  649:     entries = readdirSync(output)
  650:   } catch {
  651:     return
  652:   }
  653: 
  654:   for (const entry of entries) {
  655:     try {
  656:       rmSync(join(output, entry), { recursive: true, force: true })
  657:     } catch {
  658:       // Best-effort cleanup
  659:     }
  660:   }
  661: }
  662: 
  663: function extractMarkdownTitle(content: string): string {
  664:   const match = content.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
  665:   return match?.[1]?.trim() ?? ''
  666: }
  667: 
  668: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  669: // .gitignore management
  670: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  671: 
  672: export function ensureGitignore(root: string, entry: string): void {
  673:   const gitignorePath = join(root, '.gitignore')
  674:   let existing = ''
  675:   if (existsSync(gitignorePath)) {
  676:     try {
  677:       existing = readFileSync(gitignorePath, 'utf-8')
  678:     } catch {
  679:       return
  680:     }
  681:   }
  682:   // Check if already present (normalize line endings)
  683:   const lines = existing.replace(/\r\n/g, '\n').split('\n')
  684:   if (lines.some(l => l.trim() === entry.trim())) return
  685: 
  686:   // Append with trailing newline
  687:   const append = existing.endsWith('\n') ? entry + '\n' : '\n' + entry + '\n'
  688:   try {
  689:     appendFileSync(gitignorePath, append, 'utf-8')
  690:   } catch {
  691:     // Best-effort
  692:   }
  693: }

Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Transcript import 鈥?orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { dirname, extname, join, basename, relative } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript, TranscriptArtifact } from '../types/transcript.js'
   10: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   11: import {
   12:   loadJson,
   13:   normalizeTimestamp,
   14:   sha256File,
   15:   slugify,
   16:   timestampPartition,
   17:   yamlEscape,
   18: } from './common.js'
   19: import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
   20: 
   21: export async function importTranscript(
   22:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
   23:   root: string,
   24:   globalRoot: string,
   25:   projectSlug: string,
   26:   rawUploadPermission: string,
   27:   mirrorToRepo = true,
   28: ): Promise<ManifestEntry> {
   29:   const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
   30:   const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
   31:   const sessionLabel = slugify(
   32:     parsed.session_id,
   33:     slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
   34:   )
   35:   const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
   36:   const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
   37: 
   38:   const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
   39: 
   40:   const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
   41:   const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
   42:   const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
   43:   const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   44:   const repoFullPath = join(repoRoot, 'full', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   45: 
   46:   const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
   47:   const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
   48:   const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   49:   const globalFullPath = join(globalRoot, 'full', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
   50:   const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
   51:   const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
   52: 
   53:   for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalFullPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
   54:     mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
   55:   }
   56:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
   57:     for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath, repoFullPath]) {
   58:       mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
   59:     }
   60:   }
   61: 
   62:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
   63:     copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)
   64:   }
   65:   copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)
   66: 
   67:   let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
   68:     client: parsed.client,
   69:     project: projectSlug,
   70:     session_id: parsed.session_id,
   71:     title: parsed.title,
   72:     started_at: parsed.started_at,
   73:     imported_at: importedAt,
   74:     cwd: parsed.cwd,
   75:     branch: parsed.branch,
   76:     raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
   77:     raw_sha256: rawSha256,
   78:     raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
   79:     repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
   80:     repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
   81:     repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
   82:     repo_full_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoFullPath)) : '',
   83:     global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
   84:     global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
   85:     global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
   86:     global_full_path: toPosixPath(globalFullPath),
   87:     message_count: parsed.messages.length,
   88:     tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
   89:     event_count: parsed.events.length,
   90:     cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
   91:     repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
   92:   }
   93: 
   94:   const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
   95:   manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
   96: 
   97:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
   98:     writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)
   99:     writeFullJson(parsed, repoFullPath)
  100:   }
  101:   writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)
  102:   writeFullJson(parsed, globalFullPath)
  103:   const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
  104:   if (mirrorToRepo) {
  105:     writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifestRecord)
  106:   }
  107:   const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifestRecord)
  108:   writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifestRecord)
  109:   if (appendToEventLog) {
  110:     appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifestRecord)
  111:   }
  112:   await upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
  113: 
  114:   return manifest
  115: }
  116: 
  117: export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
  118:   return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0 || parsed.events.length > 0
  119: }
  120: 
  121: export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
  122:   const lines: string[] = [
  123:     '---',
  124:     `client: ${manifest.client}`,
  125:     `project: ${manifest.project}`,
  126:     `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
  127:     `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
  128:     `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
  129:     `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
  130:     `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
  131:     `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
  132:     `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
  133:     `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
  134:     `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
  135:     `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
  136:     '---',
  137:     '',
  138:     `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
  139:     '',
  140:     '## Metadata',
  141:     `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
  142:     `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
  143:     `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
  144:     `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
  145:     `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
  146:     `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
  147:     `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
  148:     `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
  149:     `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
  150:     '',
  151:     '## Messages',
  152:   ]
  153: 
  154:   if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
  155:     for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
  156:       const message = parsed.messages[i]!
  157:       lines.push(
  158:         `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
  159:         `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
  160:         '',
  161:         message.text,
  162:         '',
  163:       )
  164:     }
  165:   } else {
  166:     lines.push(
  167:       'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
  168:       '',
  169:     )
  170:   }
  171: 
  172:   writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
  173: }
  174: 
  175: export function writeFullJson(parsed: ParsedTranscript, filePath: string): void {
  176:   const artifact: TranscriptArtifact = {
  177:     schema_version: 'transcript.full.v1',
  178:     ...parsed,
  179:   }
  180:   writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(artifact, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
  181: }
  182: 
  183: export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
  184:   existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
  185:   payload: ManifestEntry,
  186: ): ManifestEntry {
  187:   if (existing === null) return payload
  188:   const payloadRecord = { ...payload } as Record<string, unknown>
  189:   if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payloadRecord))) return payload
  190:   const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
  191:   if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
  192:     return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
  193:   }
  194:   return payload
  195: }
  196: 
  197: export function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
  198:   const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
  199:   for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
  200:     if (key !== 'imported_at') {
  201:       result[key] = value
  202:     }
  203:   }
  204:   return result
  205: }
  206: 
  207: export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
  208:   if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
  209:   try {
  210:     const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
  211:     return !deepEqual(current, payload)
  212:   } catch {
  213:     return true
  214:   }
  215: }
  216: 
  217: export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
  218:   writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
  219: }
  220: 
  221: export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
  222:   appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
  223: }
  224: 
  225: export function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
  226:   if (source === destination) return
  227:   copyFileSync(source, destination)
  228: }
  229: 
  230: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  231: // Internal helpers
  232: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  233: 
  234: function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
  235:   const base = basename(filePath)
  236:   const ext = extname(base)
  237:   return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
  238: }
  239: 
  240: function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
  241:   if (a === b) return true
  242:   if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
  243:   if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
  244:   if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
  245:   const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
  246:   const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
  247:   const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
  248:   const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
  249:   if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
  250:   return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
  251: }

Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Transcript discovery 鈥?file scanning and project matching.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_discover.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { homedir } from 'node:os'
    8: import { basename, dirname, resolve } from 'node:path'
    9: 
   10: import fg from 'fast-glob'
   11: 
   12: import type { ParsedTranscript } from '../types/transcript.js'
   13: import { slugify, CLIENTS } from './common.js'
   14: import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
   15: 
   16: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   17: // Glob patterns per client
   18: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   19: 
   20: const CLIENT_PATTERNS: Readonly<Record<string, readonly string[]>> = {
   21:   codex: ['sessions/**/*.jsonl'],
   22:   claude: ['projects/**/*.jsonl'],
   23:   gemini: [
   24:     'tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.json',
   25:     'tmp/*/checkpoints/**/*.jsonl',
   26:     'history/**/*.json',
   27:     'history/**/*.jsonl',
   28:     'chats/**/*.json',
   29:     'chats/**/*.jsonl',
   30:   ],
   31: }
   32: 
   33: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   34: // Defaults
   35: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   36: 
   37: export function defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot(): string {
   38:   return toPosixPath(resolve(homedir(), '.memorytree', 'transcripts'))
   39: }
   40: 
   41: export function defaultClientRoots(): Record<string, string> {
   42:   const home = homedir()
   43:   return {
   44:     codex: resolve(home, '.codex'),
   45:     claude: resolve(home, '.claude'),
   46:     gemini: resolve(home, '.gemini'),
   47:   }
   48: }
   49: 
   50: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   51: // File discovery
   52: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   53: 
   54: export function discoverSourceFiles(
   55:   clients?: ReadonlySet<string>,
   56:   roots?: Readonly<Record<string, string>>,
   57: ): Array<[string, string]> {
   58:   const requested = clients ?? CLIENTS
   59:   const resolvedRoots = roots ?? defaultClientRoots()
   60:   const matches: Array<[string, string]> = []
   61:   const seen = new Set<string>()
   62: 
   63:   for (const client of [...requested].sort()) {
   64:     const root: string | undefined = resolvedRoots[client]
   65:     if (root === undefined || !existsSync(root)) continue
   66: 
   67:     const patterns = CLIENT_PATTERNS[client]
   68:     if (patterns === undefined) continue
   69: 
   70:     for (const pattern of patterns) {
   71:       const paths = fg.sync(pattern, { cwd: root, absolute: true, onlyFiles: true })
   72:       for (const filePath of paths) {
   73:         const resolved = toPosixPath(resolve(filePath))
   74:         const key = resolved.toLowerCase()
   75:         if (seen.has(key)) continue
   76:         seen.add(key)
   77:         matches.push([client, resolved])
   78:       }
   79:     }
   80:   }
   81: 
   82:   matches.sort((a, b) => {
   83:     const mtimeA = safeFileMtime(a[1])
   84:     const mtimeB = safeFileMtime(b[1])
   85:     if (mtimeB !== mtimeA) return mtimeB - mtimeA
   86:     const pathA = a[1].toLowerCase()
   87:     const pathB = b[1].toLowerCase()
   88:     // Reverse sort: higher path string comes first (matching Python's reverse=True)
   89:     if (pathB > pathA) return 1
   90:     if (pathB < pathA) return -1
   91:     return 0
   92:   })
   93: 
   94:   return matches
   95: }
   96: 
   97: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   98: // Project slug inference
   99: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  100: 
  101: export function inferProjectSlug(parsed: ParsedTranscript): string {
  102:   if (parsed.cwd) {
  103:     try {
  104:       const cwdBase = basename(parsed.cwd)
  105:       return slugify(cwdBase, 'project')
  106:     } catch {
  107:       // fall through
  108:     }
  109:   }
  110: 
  111:   if (parsed.client === 'claude') {
  112:     let parentName = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path)).toLowerCase()
  113:     parentName = parentName.replace(/^[a-z]--/, '')
  114:     return slugify(parentName, 'project')
  115:   }
  116: 
  117:   if (parsed.client === 'gemini') {
  118:     const parentDir = basename(dirname(parsed.source_path))
  119:     if (parentDir) {
  120:       return slugify(parentDir, 'project')
  121:     }
  122:   }
  123: 
  124:   return 'unknown-project'
  125: }
  126: 
  127: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  128: // Repo matching
  129: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  130: 
  131: export function transcriptMatchesRepo(
  132:   parsed: ParsedTranscript,
  133:   repoRoot: string,
  134:   repoSlug: string,
  135: ): boolean {
  136:   const normalizedRepo = toPosixPath(resolve(repoRoot)).toLowerCase()
  137: 
  138:   if (parsed.cwd) {
  139:     try {
  140:       const normalizedCwd = toPosixPath(resolve(parsed.cwd)).toLowerCase()
  141:       if (normalizedCwd === normalizedRepo) return true
  142:       // Check if repoRoot is a parent of cwd
  143:       const repoPrefix = normalizedRepo.endsWith('/')
  144:         ? normalizedRepo
  145:         : normalizedRepo + '/'
  146:       if (normalizedCwd.startsWith(repoPrefix)) return true
  147:     } catch {
  148:       // fall through
  149:     }
  150:   }
  151: 
  152:   return projectSlugsMatch(inferProjectSlug(parsed), repoSlug)
  153: }
  154: 
  155: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  156: // Slug matching
  157: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  158: 
  159: export function projectSlugsMatch(left: string, right: string): boolean {
  160:   return Boolean(
  161:     left && right && left === right && left !== 'unknown-project',
  162:   )
  163: }
  164: 
  165: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  166: // Safe mtime
  167: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  168: 
  169: export function safeFileMtime(filePath: string): number {
  170:   try {
  171:     return statSync(filePath).mtimeMs / 1000
  172:   } catch {
  173:     return 0
  174:   }
  175: }
Tool Result #122 shell_command call_hFxiV7PPXnmLcQEtrXSIFwAE exit 0 04:33:32
shell_command output=Exit code: 0 Wall time: 0.5 seconds Output: Using Node v20.20.1 Using Node v20.20.1 1: /** 2: * Shared constants, data-access helpers, text-extraction utilities, and dedup. 3: *...
Show output payload 
Exit code: 0
Wall time: 0.5 seconds
Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Shared constants, data-access helpers, text-extraction utilities, and dedup.
    3:  * Port of scripts/_transcript_common.py
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { createHash } from 'node:crypto'
    7: import { readFileSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    8: 
    9: import type { TranscriptMessage, TranscriptToolEvent } from '../types/transcript.js'
   10: 
   11: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   12: // Constants
   13: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   14: 
   15: export const CLIENTS: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['codex', 'claude', 'gemini'])
   16: export const TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['input_text', 'output_text', 'text'])
   17: export const SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['thinking', 'reasoning'])
   18: export const TOOL_USE_TYPES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['tool_use'])
   19: export const TOOL_RESULT_TYPES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set(['tool_result'])
   20: 
   21: const ALL_SKIP_TYPES: ReadonlySet<string> = new Set([
   22:   ...SKIP_BLOCK_TYPES, ...TOOL_USE_TYPES, ...TOOL_RESULT_TYPES,
   23: ])
   24: 
   25: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   26: // Generic utilities
   27: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   28: 
   29: export function slugify(value: string, fallback = 'session'): string {
   30:   // eslint-disable-next-line no-control-regex
   31:   const asciiValue = value.replace(/[^\x00-\x7F]/g, '').toLowerCase()
   32:   const slug = asciiValue.replace(/[^a-z0-9._-]+/g, '-').replace(/^[-._]+|[-._]+$/g, '')
   33:   return slug || fallback
   34: }
   35: 
   36: export function sha256File(filePath: string): string {
   37:   const data = readFileSync(filePath)
   38:   return createHash('sha256').update(data).digest('hex')
   39: }
   40: 
   41: export function contentHash(text: string): string {
   42:   return createHash('sha256').update(text, 'utf8').digest('hex').slice(0, 16)
   43: }
   44: 
   45: export function normalizeTimestamp(value: unknown, fallback?: string | null): string {
   46:   if (typeof value === 'number') {
   47:     // Always treat as Unix seconds (matching Python's datetime.fromtimestamp)
   48:     const d = new Date(value * 1000)
   49:     return formatUtcIso(d)
   50:   }
   51: 
   52:   if (value instanceof Date) {
   53:     return formatUtcIso(value)
   54:   }
   55: 
   56:   if (typeof value === 'string') {
   57:     const text = value.trim()
   58:     if (!text) {
   59:       return fallback ?? normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
   60:     }
   61:     const parsed = parseIsoTimestamp(text)
   62:     if (parsed !== null) {
   63:       return formatUtcIso(parsed)
   64:     }
   65:     return text
   66:   }
   67: 
   68:   return fallback ?? normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
   69: }
   70: 
   71: export function earliestTimestamp(current: string, candidate: unknown): string {
   72:   const normalized = normalizeTimestamp(candidate, current)
   73:   const currentDt = parseIsoTimestamp(current)
   74:   const normalizedDt = parseIsoTimestamp(normalized)
   75:   if (currentDt !== null && normalizedDt !== null) {
   76:     return normalizedDt < currentDt ? normalized : current
   77:   }
   78:   if (normalizedDt !== null) {
   79:     return normalized
   80:   }
   81:   return current || normalized
   82: }
   83: 
   84: export function parseIsoTimestamp(value: string): Date | null {
   85:   if (!value) return null
   86:   let candidate = value
   87:   if (candidate.endsWith('Z')) {
   88:     candidate = candidate.slice(0, -1) + '+00:00'
   89:   } else if (!/[+-]\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(candidate) && !/[+-]\d{4}$/.test(candidate)) {
   90:     // No timezone offset 鈥?treat as UTC (matching Python behavior)
   91:     candidate = candidate + '+00:00'
   92:   }
   93:   const d = new Date(candidate)
   94:   if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return null
   95:   return d
   96: }
   97: 
   98: export function timestampPartition(timestamp: string): [string, string] {
   99:   const d = parseIsoTimestamp(timestamp)
  100:   if (d === null) return ['unknown', 'unknown']
  101:   const year = d.getUTCFullYear().toString()
  102:   const month = (d.getUTCMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0')
  103:   return [year, month]
  104: }
  105: 
  106: export function joinParagraphs(parts: Iterable<string>): string {
  107:   const cleaned: string[] = []
  108:   for (const part of parts) {
  109:     const trimmed = String(part).trim()
  110:     if (trimmed) cleaned.push(trimmed)
  111:   }
  112:   return cleaned.join('\n\n')
  113: }
  114: 
  115: export function summarizeValue(value: unknown, limit = 180): string {
  116:   if (value === null || value === undefined) return 'none'
  117:   if (typeof value === 'string') {
  118:     const text = value.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
  119:     return truncate(text, limit)
  120:   }
  121:   let text: string
  122:   try {
  123:     text = JSON.stringify(sortKeysDeep(value))
  124:   } catch {
  125:     text = String(value)
  126:   }
  127:   text = text.replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim()
  128:   return truncate(text, limit)
  129: }
  130: 
  131: export function truncate(text: string, limit: number): string {
  132:   return text.length <= limit ? text : text.slice(0, limit - 3) + '...'
  133: }
  134: 
  135: export function yamlEscape(value: string): string {
  136:   const escaped = value.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"').replace(/\n/g, '\\n')
  137:   return `"${escaped}"`
  138: }
  139: 
  140: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  141: // Data access helpers
  142: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  143: 
  144: export function ensureDict(value: unknown): Record<string, unknown> {
  145:   if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
  146:     return value as Record<string, unknown>
  147:   }
  148:   return {}
  149: }
  150: 
  151: export function ensureList(value: unknown): unknown[] {
  152:   return Array.isArray(value) ? value : []
  153: }
  154: 
  155: export function getNested(payload: Record<string, unknown>, ...keys: string[]): unknown {
  156:   let current: unknown = payload
  157:   for (const key of keys) {
  158:     if (current === null || typeof current !== 'object' || Array.isArray(current)) {
  159:       return null
  160:     }
  161:     current = (current as Record<string, unknown>)[key]
  162:   }
  163:   return current ?? null
  164: }
  165: 
  166: export function loadJsonl(filePath: string): Record<string, unknown>[] {
  167:   let content: string
  168:   try {
  169:     content = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')
  170:   } catch {
  171:     return []
  172:   }
  173:   const records: Record<string, unknown>[] = []
  174:   for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
  175:     const trimmed = line.trim()
  176:     if (!trimmed) continue
  177:     try {
  178:       records.push(JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>)
  179:     } catch {
  180:       continue
  181:     }
  182:   }
  183:   return records
  184: }
  185: 
  186: export function loadJson(filePath: string): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  187:   if (!existsSync(filePath)) return null
  188:   try {
  189:     const text = readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')
  190:     return JSON.parse(text) as Record<string, unknown>
  191:   } catch {
  192:     return null
  193:   }
  194: }
  195: 
  196: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  197: // Text extraction helpers
  198: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  199: 
  200: export function extractTextBlocks(blocks: unknown): string {
  201:   const parts: string[] = []
  202: 
  203:   for (const block of ensureList(blocks)) {
  204:     if (typeof block === 'string') {
  205:       const text = block.trim()
  206:       if (text) parts.push(text)
  207:       continue
  208:     }
  209:     if (block === null || typeof block !== 'object' || Array.isArray(block)) continue
  210: 
  211:     const rec = block as Record<string, unknown>
  212:     const blockType = String(rec['type'] ?? '').toLowerCase()
  213:     if (ALL_SKIP_TYPES.has(blockType)) continue
  214:     if (TEXT_BLOCK_TYPES.has(blockType)) {
  215:       const text = String(rec['text'] ?? '').trim()
  216:       if (text) parts.push(text)
  217:       continue
  218:     }
  219:     const fallbackText = extractSimpleText(block)
  220:     if (fallbackText) parts.push(fallbackText)
  221:   }
  222:   return joinParagraphs(parts)
  223: }
  224: 
  225: export function extractSimpleText(value: unknown): string {
  226:   if (typeof value === 'string') return value.trim()
  227:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
  228:     return joinParagraphs(value.map(item => extractSimpleText(item)))
  229:   }
  230:   if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object') {
  231:     const rec = value as Record<string, unknown>
  232:     for (const key of ['text', 'content', 'value']) {
  233:       if (key in rec && typeof rec[key] === 'string') {
  234:         return (rec[key] as string).trim()
  235:       }
  236:     }
  237:     return ''
  238:   }
  239:   return ''
  240: }
  241: 
  242: export function extractGeminiText(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
  243:   const parts: string[] = []
  244:   for (const key of ['parts', 'content', 'text', 'message']) {
  245:     parts.push(...extractGeminiParts(node[key]))
  246:   }
  247:   return joinParagraphs(parts)
  248: }
  249: 
  250: export function extractGeminiParts(value: unknown): string[] {
  251:   if (typeof value === 'string') {
  252:     const text = value.trim()
  253:     return text ? [text] : []
  254:   }
  255:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
  256:     const parts: string[] = []
  257:     for (const item of value) {
  258:       parts.push(...extractGeminiParts(item))
  259:     }
  260:     return parts
  261:   }
  262:   if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object') {
  263:     const rec = value as Record<string, unknown>
  264:     const blockType = String(rec['type'] ?? '').toLowerCase()
  265:     if (ALL_SKIP_TYPES.has(blockType)) return []
  266:     if ('text' in rec && typeof rec['text'] === 'string') {
  267:       const text = (rec['text'] as string).trim()
  268:       return text ? [text] : []
  269:     }
  270:     const parts: string[] = []
  271:     for (const key of ['parts', 'content']) {
  272:       if (key in rec) {
  273:         parts.push(...extractGeminiParts(rec[key]))
  274:       }
  275:     }
  276:     return parts
  277:   }
  278:   return []
  279: }
  280: 
  281: export function findFirstMappingWithKeys(value: unknown, keys: ReadonlySet<string>): Record<string, unknown> | null {
  282:   if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object' && !Array.isArray(value)) {
  283:     const rec = value as Record<string, unknown>
  284:     const recKeys = Object.keys(rec)
  285:     if (recKeys.some(k => keys.has(k))) return rec
  286:     for (const v of Object.values(rec)) {
  287:       const result = findFirstMappingWithKeys(v, keys)
  288:       if (result !== null) return result
  289:     }
  290:     return null
  291:   }
  292:   if (Array.isArray(value)) {
  293:     for (const item of value) {
  294:       const result = findFirstMappingWithKeys(item, keys)
  295:       if (result !== null) return result
  296:     }
  297:   }
  298:   return null
  299: }
  300: 
  301: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  302: // Deduplication helpers
  303: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  304: 
  305: export function deduplicateMessages(messages: readonly TranscriptMessage[]): TranscriptMessage[] {
  306:   const seen = new Set<string>()
  307:   const result: TranscriptMessage[] = []
  308:   for (const msg of messages) {
  309:     const sig = `${msg.timestamp ?? ''}\0${msg.role}\0${contentHash(msg.text)}`
  310:     if (!seen.has(sig)) {
  311:       seen.add(sig)
  312:       result.push(msg)
  313:     }
  314:   }
  315:   return result
  316: }
  317: 
  318: export function deduplicateToolEvents(events: readonly TranscriptToolEvent[]): TranscriptToolEvent[] {
  319:   const seen = new Set<string>()
  320:   const result: TranscriptToolEvent[] = []
  321:   for (const evt of events) {
  322:     const sig = `${evt.timestamp ?? ''}\0${contentHash(evt.summary)}`
  323:     if (!seen.has(sig)) {
  324:       seen.add(sig)
  325:       result.push(evt)
  326:     }
  327:   }
  328:   return result
  329: }
  330: 
  331: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  332: // Internal helpers
  333: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  334: 
  335: function sortKeysDeep(value: unknown): unknown {
  336:   if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(sortKeysDeep)
  337:   if (value !== null && typeof value === 'object') {
  338:     const sorted: Record<string, unknown> = {}
  339:     for (const key of Object.keys(value as Record<string, unknown>).sort()) {
  340:       sorted[key] = sortKeysDeep((value as Record<string, unknown>)[key])
  341:     }
  342:     return sorted
  343:   }
  344:   return value
  345: }
  346: 
  347: function formatUtcIso(d: Date): string {
  348:   const year = d.getUTCFullYear()
  349:   const month = String(d.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0')
  350:   const day = String(d.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0')
  351:   const hours = String(d.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0')
  352:   const minutes = String(d.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0')
  353:   const seconds = String(d.getUTCSeconds()).padStart(2, '0')
  354:   return `${year}-${month}-${day}T${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}Z`
  355: }

Output:
Using Node v20.20.1
Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * Transcript search index 鈥?SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog.
    3:  *
    4:  * Uses sql.js (WebAssembly SQLite) so the module works without a native
    5:  * sqlite3 binding.  The WASM init is async; we cache the resulting factory
    6:  * promise so it is only resolved once per process.
    7:  */
    8: 
    9: import initSqlJs, { type SqlJsStatic } from 'sql.js'
   10: import { existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs'
   11: import type { ManifestEntry } from '../types/transcript.js'
   12: 
   13: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   14: // Lazy sql.js initialisation (cached promise)
   15: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   16: 
   17: let sqlPromise: Promise<SqlJsStatic> | null = null
   18: 
   19: function getSqlJs(): Promise<SqlJsStatic> {
   20:   if (sqlPromise === null) {
   21:     sqlPromise = initSqlJs()
   22:   }
   23:   return sqlPromise
   24: }
   25: 
   26: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   27: // Column definitions
   28: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   29: 
   30: const PK_COLUMNS = [
   31:   'client',
   32:   'project',
   33:   'session_id',
   34:   'raw_sha256',
   35: ] as const
   36: 
   37: const DATA_COLUMNS = [
   38:   'title',
   39:   'started_at',
   40:   'imported_at',
   41:   'cwd',
   42:   'branch',
   43:   'raw_source_path',
   44:   'raw_upload_permission',
   45:   'global_raw_path',
   46:   'global_clean_path',
   47:   'global_manifest_path',
   48:   'global_full_path',
   49:   'repo_raw_path',
   50:   'repo_clean_path',
   51:   'repo_manifest_path',
   52:   'repo_full_path',
   53:   'message_count',
   54:   'tool_event_count',
   55:   'event_count',
   56: ] as const
   57: 
   58: const ALL_COLUMNS = [...PK_COLUMNS, ...DATA_COLUMNS] as const
   59: type ColumnName = (typeof ALL_COLUMNS)[number]
   60: 
   61: const COLUMN_DEFS: Record<ColumnName, { type: 'TEXT' | 'INTEGER'; defaultValue: string }> = {
   62:   client: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   63:   project: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   64:   session_id: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   65:   raw_sha256: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   66:   title: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   67:   started_at: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   68:   imported_at: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   69:   cwd: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   70:   branch: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   71:   raw_source_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   72:   raw_upload_permission: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   73:   global_raw_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   74:   global_clean_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   75:   global_manifest_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   76:   global_full_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   77:   repo_raw_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   78:   repo_clean_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   79:   repo_manifest_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   80:   repo_full_path: { type: 'TEXT', defaultValue: "''" },
   81:   message_count: { type: 'INTEGER', defaultValue: '0' },
   82:   tool_event_count: { type: 'INTEGER', defaultValue: '0' },
   83:   event_count: { type: 'INTEGER', defaultValue: '0' },
   84: }
   85: 
   86: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   87: // SQL statements (built once)
   88: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   89: 
   90: const CREATE_TABLE_SQL = `
   91:   CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (
   92:     ${ALL_COLUMNS.map((column) => columnDefinition(column)).join(',\n    ')},
   93:     PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)
   94:   )
   95: `
   96: 
   97: const UPSERT_SQL = `
   98:   INSERT INTO transcripts (
   99:     ${ALL_COLUMNS.join(', ')}
  100:   ) VALUES (${ALL_COLUMNS.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
  101:   ON CONFLICT(${PK_COLUMNS.join(', ')}) DO UPDATE SET
  102:     ${DATA_COLUMNS.map((c) => `${c} = excluded.${c}`).join(',\n    ')}
  103: `
  104: 
  105: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  106: // Public API
  107: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  108: 
  109: /**
  110:  * Insert or update a single transcript manifest row in the SQLite search
  111:  * index at `dbPath`.  Creates the database and table if they do not exist.
  112:  *
  113:  * The function is async because the first call must initialise the sql.js
  114:  * WASM module.
  115:  */
  116: export async function upsertSearchIndex(
  117:   dbPath: string,
  118:   manifest: ManifestEntry,
  119: ): Promise<void> {
  120:   const SQL = await getSqlJs()
  121: 
  122:   const db = existsSync(dbPath)
  123:     ? new SQL.Database(readFileSync(dbPath))
  124:     : new SQL.Database()
  125: 
  126:   try {
  127:     db.run('PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL')
  128:     ensureTableSchema(db)
  129: 
  130:     const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }
  131:     const params = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {
  132:       const value = record[col]
  133:       if (value === undefined || value === null) {
  134:         return COLUMN_DEFS[col].type === 'INTEGER' ? 0 : ''
  135:       }
  136:       return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)
  137:     })
  138: 
  139:     db.run(UPSERT_SQL, params)
  140: 
  141:     const data = db.export()
  142:     writeFileSync(dbPath, Buffer.from(data))
  143:   } finally {
  144:     db.close()
  145:   }
  146: }
  147: 
  148: function columnDefinition(column: ColumnName, includeDefault = false): string {
  149:   const def = COLUMN_DEFS[column]
  150:   return `${column} ${def.type} NOT NULL${includeDefault ? ` DEFAULT ${def.defaultValue}` : ''}`
  151: }
  152: 
  153: function ensureTableSchema(db: {
  154:   run: (sql: string) => unknown
  155:   exec: (sql: string) => Array<{ values: unknown[][] }>
  156: }): void {
  157:   db.run(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)
  158: 
  159:   const info = db.exec('PRAGMA table_info(transcripts)')
  160:   const existing = new Set(
  161:     info[0]?.values.map((row) => String(row[1] ?? '')) ?? [],
  162:   )
  163: 
  164:   for (const column of DATA_COLUMNS) {
  165:     if (!existing.has(column)) {
  166:       db.run(`ALTER TABLE transcripts ADD COLUMN ${columnDefinition(column, true)}`)
  167:     }
  168:   }
  169: }

Using Node v20.20.1
    1: /**
    2:  * CLI adapters for `memorytree report build` and `memorytree report serve`.
    3:  */
    4: 
    5: import { createServer } from 'node:http'
    6: import { createReadStream, existsSync, statSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { extname, join, resolve, sep } from 'node:path'
    8: import { collectExtraManifestDirs as collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs } from '../report/extra-manifests.js'
    9: 
   10: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   11: // Build command
   12: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   13: 
   14: export interface CmdReportBuildOptions {
   15:   root: string
   16:   output: string
   17:   noAi: boolean
   18:   model: string
   19:   locale?: string
   20:   reportBaseUrl?: string
   21: }
   22: 
   23: export async function cmdReportBuild(opts: CmdReportBuildOptions): Promise<number> {
   24:   const { buildReport } = await import('../report/build.js')
   25:   try {
   26:     const resolvedRoot = resolve(opts.root)
   27:     const buildOptions = {
   28:       root: resolvedRoot,
   29:       output: resolve(opts.output),
   30:       noAi: opts.noAi,
   31:       model: opts.model,
   32:       ...(opts.locale ? { locale: opts.locale } : {}),
   33:       ...(opts.reportBaseUrl ? { reportBaseUrl: opts.reportBaseUrl } : {}),
   34:       extraManifestDirs: collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs(resolvedRoot),
   35:     }
   36:     await buildReport(buildOptions)
   37:     console.log(`Report generated at: ${resolve(opts.output)}`)
   38:     console.log(`Open: ${join(resolve(opts.output), 'index.html')}`)
   39:     return 0
   40:   } catch (err: unknown) {
   41:     console.error(`Report build failed: ${String(err)}`)
   42:     return 1
   43:   }
   44: }
   45: 
   46: export function collectExtraManifestDirs(root: string): string[] {
   47:   return collectRegisteredProjectManifestDirs(root)
   48: }
   49: 
   50: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   51: // Serve command
   52: // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   53: 
   54: export interface CmdReportServeOptions {
   55:   dir: string
   56:   port: number
   57: }
   58: 
   59: export function cmdReportServe(opts: CmdReportServeOptions): number {
   60:   const root = resolve(opts.dir)
   61:   const port = opts.port
   62: 
   63:   const MIME: Record<string, string> = {
   64:     '.html': 'text/html; charset=utf-8',
   65:     '.css': 'text/css',
   66:     '.js': 'application/javascript',
   67:     '.json': 'application/json',
   68:     '.svg': 'image/svg+xml',
   69:     '.ico': 'image/x-icon',
   70:   }
   71: 
   72:   const server = createServer((req, res) => {
   73:     let urlPath: string
   74:     try {
   75:       urlPath = decodeURIComponent((req.url ?? '/').split('?')[0] ?? '/')
   76:     } catch {
   77:       res.writeHead(400, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   78:       res.end('Bad request')
   79:       return
   80:     }
   81: 
   82:     let filePath = join(root, urlPath)
   83: 
   84:     // Containment check: reject paths that escape the serve root
   85:     // Use sep (\ on Windows, / on Unix) so the check works cross-platform.
   86:     if (!filePath.startsWith(root + sep) && filePath !== root) {
   87:       res.writeHead(403, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   88:       res.end('Forbidden')
   89:       return
   90:     }
   91: 
   92:     // Serve index.html for directory requests
   93:     if (existsSync(filePath) && statSync(filePath).isDirectory()) {
   94:       filePath = join(filePath, 'index.html')
   95:     }
   96: 
   97:     if (!existsSync(filePath)) {
   98:       res.writeHead(404, { 'Content-Type': 'text/plain' })
   99:       res.end('Not found')
  100:       return
  101:     }
  102: 
  103:     const ext = extname(filePath)
  104:     const contentType = MIME[ext] ?? 'application/octet-stream'
  105:     res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType })
  106:     const stream = createReadStream(filePath)
  107:     stream.on('error', () => { res.destroy() })
  108:     stream.pipe(res)
  109:   })
  110: 
  111:   server.on('error', (err: NodeJS.ErrnoException) => {
  112:     if (err.code === 'EADDRINUSE') {
  113:       console.error(`Error: port ${port} is already in use.`)
  114:       process.exit(1)
  115:     }
  116:     console.error(`Server error: ${String(err)}`)
  117:     process.exit(1)
  118:   })
  119: 
  120:   server.listen(port, () => {
  121:     console.log('Temporary local preview server started.')
  122:     console.log('For long-running local access, prefer Caddy hosting this directory.')
  123:     console.log(`Serving ${root}`)
  124:     console.log(`Open: http://localhost:${port}/`)
  125:     console.log('Press Ctrl+C to stop.')
  126:   })
  127: 
  128:   return 0
  129: }

    1: /**
    2:  * CLI: memorytree recall 鈥?on-demand transcript sync + session lookup.
    3:  * Port of scripts/recall-session.py CLI wrapper.
    4:  */
    5: 
    6: import { existsSync } from 'node:fs'
    7: import { resolve } from 'node:path'
    8: 
    9: import { recall, formatText } from '../recall/recall.js'
   10: 
   11: export interface RecallOptions {
   12:   root: string
   13:   projectName: string
   14:   globalRoot: string
   15:   activationTime: string
   16:   format: string
   17: }
   18: 
   19: export async function cmdRecall(options: RecallOptions): Promise<number> {
   20:   const root = resolve(options.root)
   21:   if (!existsSync(root)) {
   22:     process.stderr.write(`root does not exist: ${root}\n`)
   23:     return 1
   24:   }
   25: 
   26:   const result = await recall(root, options.projectName, options.globalRoot, options.activationTime)
   27: 
   28:   if (options.format === 'json') {
   29:     process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify(result) + '\n')
   30:   } else {
   31:     process.stdout.write(formatText(result) + '\n')
   32:   }
   33:   return 0
   34: }
